title: Hiring for History YouTube Channel - Video Editor & Motion Designer
description:
I run a YouTube channel, Journey Through History, focused on cinematic storytelling about world history, mythology, and ancient civilization. With a revamp of the channel, I am aiming to be similar in style to channels like Para Bellum, Kings and Generals, and Epic History.



Due to time constraints, I’m no longer able to manage the full production process myself, but I remain deeply passionate about the channel and its long-term vision. I’m looking for a Video Editor with motion design capability to produce high-quality, engaging history videos in a documentary style.



Role Overview

You will take voiceover, storyboard, and assets and turn them into a polished, YouTube-ready video, combining editing with motion graphics.



Responsibilities

Full video editing (20–40 minute videos)



Integrate:

Historical images and footage

Maps and illustrations

Motion graphics and transitions



Add:

Light animation

Sound design and music

Maintain pacing aligned with storytelling style of top history channels



Deliverables

Fully edited final video

Optional reusable templates for consistency

title: Website Designer
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a skilled and creative Website Designer to join our remote team. The ideal candidate has a strong eye for design, user experience, and modern web trends, and can create visually appealing and high-converting websites.



Responsibilities

Design and build responsive websites (desktop & mobile)

Create website layouts, landing pages, and UI elements

Work with platforms like WordPress, Shopify, or Webflow

Customize themes and templates based on brand guidelines

Optimize websites for speed, SEO, and user experience

Collaborate with developers, marketers, or content writers

Perform website updates, maintenance, and troubleshooting

Requirements

Proven experience as a Website Designer or similar role

Strong portfolio showcasing website design projects

Proficiency in tools like Figma, Adobe XD, or Photoshop

Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS (JavaScript is a plus)

Experience with CMS platforms (WordPress, Shopify, etc.)

Understanding of UX/UI principles and responsive design

Good English communication skills

Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



Nice to Have

title: Remote Accountant
description:
The General Accountant is a key operational role within the Finprojections client service team, ensuring accurate and timely financial record-keeping for our startup clients. This role works closely with our FP&A Analysts and Expert CFOs to manage day-to-day accounting tasks, maintain organized records, and support month-end closing activities. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, reliable, and thrives in a dynamic environment.



Key Responsibilities:



Finance Operations:

Issue invoices and record bills promptly and accurately.

Process payroll and expense claims.

Set up bill payments and payroll payments for approval.



Accounting Operations:

Set up Chart of Accounts

Perform bank reconciliations.

Record manual journal entries, including:

Inventory reconciliations

Capitalization

Lease amortization

Depreciation



Tracking and Documentation:

Maintain trackers for vendor lists, contract lists, employee compensation details, fixed asset registers, and project-based capitalization.

Store contracts, bills, and invoices in an organized and easily retrievable manner.



Tax Compliance and Reporting:

Prepare GST filings and corporate tax computations.

Assist in preparing unaudited financial reports.



Month-End Close Support:

Collaborate with the FP&A Analyst to ensure smooth and timely month-end close processes.



Qualifications:

2-3 years of experience in as a general accountant.

Strong knowledge of GAAP or relevant certification.

Extensive experience in financial operations including AR, AP, and Payroll.

Proficiency in accounting software like Quickbooks, Xero and Microsoft Excel.



Preferred Qualifications:

CPA certified or CPA track.



Core Competencies:

Ownership: Takes pride in accuracy and completeness of financial records.

Resourcefulness: Identifies opportunities to improve and automate repetitive processes.

Client Orientation: Delivers reliable and high-quality work to support client success.

Collaboration: Works effectively within the POD structure to achieve collective goals.

title: Aquisition Manager (Real Estate Investing)
description:
We are a growing real estate investment company. We acquire residential, and land properties through cash offers targeting distressed and motivated sellers across North America.



We are looking for a hungry, self-motivated Acquisition Manager to join our team on a commission-only basis. This is a performance-based role ideal for someone who thrives in sales, loves real estate, and wants unlimited earning potential.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Follow up with warm and cold leads generated.

- Speak directly with motivated sellers, build rapport, and negotiate purchase agreements

- Negotiate the lowest possible acquisition price  your commission is tied to profit, so the better you negotiate, the more you earn

- Analyze basic property details and comparable sales to determine offer pricing (training provided)

- Present cash offers to sellers and handle objections

- Guide sellers through the contract and closing process

- Update CRM with deal progress, notes, and status changes

- Meet or exceed monthly acquisition targets

-This is not a fulltime job. The only thing that's required is you must be able to call warm lead IMMEDIATELY as it comes through, so you must be on stand by.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Excellent English communication skills (phone and written)

- Experience in real estate, sales, or cold calling (MUST)

-Must have Real Estate Investing Knowledge and how it works

- Ability to handle rejection and stay persistent

- Strong negotiation skills and ability to build trust quickly

- Comfortable using CRM tools

- Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace for calls

- Available to work during North American business hours (EST)



COMPENSATION:

- Commission: 5% of the after-sale profit per completed deal

- Estimated earnings: $500 - $4,000 per deal depending on deal size and how well you negotiate the purchase price

- The lower you negotiate the acquisition price, the higher the profit, and the bigger your commission your skills directly impact your pay.

- No cap on earnings, the more deals you close, the more you earn

- Average deal cycle: 2-16 weeks

- Top performers can realistically close 4+ deals per month





WHY JOIN US:

- Leads are generated for you. No need to build your own pipeline

- Work remotely from anywhere

- Be part of a fast-growing, tech-driven real estate investment firm

- Opportunity to grow into a leadership role as we scale

- Training and scripts provided to get you started



This is a START position we need someone ready to hit the ground running immediately. If you have the drive and want to earn based on results, apply now.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Part-Time Virtual Assistant

Social Media · Podcast & Speaking Outreach · Online Course Support · Executive Admin

Location: Remote 

Hours: Part-Time, ~20 hours/week

Schedule: Flexible; some overlap with US Central Time preferred

Start Date: ASAP



About the Role

I'm an entrepreneur, online course creator, and professional speaker/corporate workshop facilitator looking for a reliable, proactive VA to help me grow my brand and free up my time. You'll play a key role in getting my message in front of more people — through podcast appearances, speaking stages, and consistent social media presence — while also keeping my back office running smoothly.

This is a long-term position for someone who takes initiative, communicates clearly, and genuinely cares about doing great work.



What You'll Be Doing

????? Podcast & Speaking Outreach (top priority)

• Research podcasts in my niche and build a running outreach list

• Write and send personalized pitch
s on my behalf

• Research conferences, summits, and corporate events accepting speakers

• Follow up on outreach — diligently and on schedule

• Maintain an organized tracker (Airtable or Google Sheets) for all outreach activity



???? Social Media Management

• Repurpose my existing content (talks, course material, ideas) into platform-ready posts

• Schedule and publish content across LinkedIn, Instagram, and/or other platforms

• Draft a simple weekly content calendar for my review and approval

• Monitor comments and DMs; flag anything needing my personal reply

• Research relevant hashtags, trends, and accounts in my space



???? Online Course Support

• Monitor and respond to student questions in the course community

• Track enrollments and flag students who may need extra support

• Assist with course launch prep — drafts, FAQs,
 sequences

• Research potential affiliate and referral partners



????
 & Calendar Management

• Triage my inbox daily and draft responses for my review

• Schedule meetings, calls, and speaking/workshop prep sessions

• Send confirmations and follow-ups after meetings

• Manage my booking links (Calendly or similar)



???? Research & Admin

• Weekly research on industry trends, competitor content, and opportunities

• Keep my speaker bio, one-sheet, and media kit up to date

• Gather and organize testimonials and case studies from students/clients

• Handle miscellaneous admin tasks as they come up



You're a Great Fit If You...

• Have experience supporting a personal brand, course creator, coach, or speaker

• Write excellent English — especially for outreach and professional
s

• Are comfortable working independently with minimal hand-holding

• Are highly organized and never let follow-ups fall through the cracks

• Are proactive: you spot opportunities and flag them without being asked

• Communicate clearly and promptly about progress, blockers, and updates



Tools We'll Be Using

Experience with any of these is a plus — but you don't need to know all of them:



• Communication: Gmail, WhatsApp

• Calendar & Scheduling: Google Calendar, Calendly

• Social Media: GoHighLevel; Canva for basic graphics; LinkedIn,
, InstaGram

• Tracking: Airtable or Google Sheets

• Docs: Google Docs / Google Drive

• Course Platform: GoHighLevel



How to Apply

Please send a short message (no more than 3 paragraphs) that covers:



• Your experience supporting a course creator, coach, or personal brand

• One example of outreach work you've done (podcast pitching, speaking research, sales outreach, etc.)

• The tools you're most comfortable with



Applications without this information will not be reviewed. Please write your own message — do not use a template.



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Designer
description:
### About Gabrielle Sands Publishing



Gabrielle Sands Publishing is the publishing company behind Gabrielle Sands, a self-published dark romance and mafia romance author with 7 published titles and an 8th launching Q2 2026. We're expanding into direct sales (sprayed edge special editions, deluxe boxes) and building out two websites — 
 (author brand hub) and 
 (Shopify storefront). We need a designer who can own the visual identity across everything we produce.



### The Brand



Dark romance / mafia romance. Think moody, elegant, high-contrast. Rich blacks, deep reds, golds. Sophisticated typography. The aesthetic sits at the intersection of danger and luxury — Italian mafia families, forbidden love, beautiful but sharp.



### What You'll Work On



- **Book marketing graphics** — social media posts, release announcements, pre-order graphics, countdowns

- **Website design** — landing pages, banners, product photography styling guidance

- **Storefront assets** — Shopify product images, collection graphics, promotional banners

- **Brand collateral** —
 headers, newsletter graphics, podcast artwork

- **Merchandise design** — bookmarks, stickers, box inserts, packaging design concepts

- **Book cover input** — collaborating on cover concepts and typography (covers are done with a dedicated cover designer, but input and iteration is valuable)

- **Ad creatives** —
/Instagram/TikTok ad graphics and short-form video templates



### Required Skills



- Brand visualization — ability to translate a mood/aesthetic into cohesive visual assets

- General design taste — strong instinct for what looks good, consistent, and on-brand

- Graphic design — layouts, compositions, marketing materials (Canva, Figma, Adobe Suite, or equivalent)

- Typography — pairing fonts, hierarchy, readability across formats

- Illustration — decorative elements, icons, flourishes that fit the dark romance genre

- AI design tools — experience with Midjourney, DALL-E, Adobe Firefly, or similar tools to accelerate creative workflows

- Website design — landing page layouts, UI for Shopify/WordPress

- UX/UI fundamentals — user-friendly layouts, mobile-first thinking



### Nice to Have



- Image editing — photo manipulation, compositing, color grading

- Video editing — short-form reels, book trailers, animated graphics

- Motion graphics — animated social posts, countdown timers

- Experience in book publishing, romance genre, or author branding

- Familiarity with Shopify and/or WordPress

title: MEP Engineer
description:
This is a remote position for a detail-oriented MEP Engineer to support U.S.-based construction and design-build projects. The role involves the design, coordination, and documentation of Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing systems for commercial and/or residential developments. You will be in charge of preparing energy reports and the ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise and experience with Florida building codes.



Key Responsibilities



- Prepare energy reports and compliance documentation as required

- Design and develop MEP systems for commercial and residential projects

- Perform HVAC load calculations (Manual J, D, S preferred)

- Prepare electrical load calculations, panel schedules, and single-line diagrams

- Design plumbing layouts and perform sizing calculations

- Create and revise detailed drawings using AutoCAD and/or Revit MEP

- Coordinate with architects, structural engineers, and project managers

- Review shop drawings and respond to RFIs

- Ensure designs comply with applicable FL Building codes



Key Qualifications



- Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or related Engineering field

- 3–7+ years of experience in MEP design

- Proficiency in AutoCAD

- Revit MEP and Procore experience (strongly preferred)

- Experience with load calculation software

- Familiarity with Bluebeam or similar PDF markup tools

- Strong understanding of U.S. building codes and standards, especially Florida building codes

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

- Experience supporting U.S.-based projects remotely

- Experience working with Design-Build firms

This is NOT a VA support role - you'll build and run the entire business: lead generation (50-70 cold calls daily), sales, team recruitment, scheduling, customer service, and operations management. You'll have full autonomy, P&L visibility, and salary increase in line with profits 



Requirements: 3+ years operations/management experience, proven lead generation and sales closing ability, native-level English, team management background, autonomous work style. Available UK business hours (9am-5pm UK = 5pm-1am Manila).



This is a genuine MD role with entrepreneurial upside. If you want to build a business (not just execute tasks), apply with CV, cover letter answering problem-solving scenarios, and 2-3 min video introduction doing a sales pitch.

title: Quality Assurance Reviewer — Children's Storybooks
description:
We're Toddles, a personalised children's storybook company. Every book we create is custom-illustrated for a specific child and goes through quality assurance before the customer sees it. We're looking for a detail-oriented reviewer to join our QA team.



What you'll do:



Review personalised children's storybooks (26 pages each) using our web-based admin panel

Check AI-generated illustrations for character consistency, visual quality, and accuracy (e.g., does the child's hair colour, skin tone, and clothing stay consistent across all pages?)

Review story text for grammar, spelling, age-appropriateness, and personalisation accuracy

Approve books that meet our quality bar, or flag issues for the team

Handle customer change requests — when a parent asks for revisions, you'll apply the changes and re-review

Communicate daily with the team via Slack

You'll report to our Lead QA Reviewer, who will guide you through your first reviews and help you learn our quality standards.



What we're looking for:



Strong written English — you'll be evaluating children's story text

Excellent attention to detail — spotting visual inconsistencies across 26 illustrated pages is the core skill

Experience in content moderation, editorial review, publishing, or QA

Comfortable working independently and following a structured review process

Reliable internet connection and a modern web browser (Chrome recommended)

Available for consistent daily hours (8 hrs/day)

Nice to have:



Background in children's education or children's content

Familiarity with AI-generated images and common artifacts

Data analysis skills (for tracking QA metrics over time)

What we offer:



Fully remote — work from home

Stable, long-term position with a growing company

Structured onboarding with training materials and a walkthrough video

Clear review process — no guesswork

Weekly payment via Wise

To apply, please include:



A brief note on why you think you'd be a good fit

Any relevant experience in content moderation, editorial work, or QA

Your availability to start

title: AI Systems & Fine-Tuning Engineer (Python / Open-Source LLMs)
description:
About the role

We are looking for an AI Engineer to build, train, and optimize high-performance local models. This isn’t a "prompt engineering" or API-wrapping role—you’ll be working under the hood with fine-tuning, LoRAs, and deploying models directly on GPU hardware. Your goal is to take raw open-source weights and turn them into specialized, production-ready engines that are fast, efficient, and private.



What you’ll do

Specialized Training: Execute fine-tuning on local LLMs (LoRA, QLoRA, and full fine-tuning) to adapt models for specific domain tasks.



Model Optimization: Work with the latest open-source architectures (Qwen, Llama, Mistral) to maximize their utility in real-world applications.



Data & Pipelines: Build the "factory" for our models—handling everything from data scraping and cleaning to automated training and evaluation loops.



Inference Engineering: Optimize for speed. You’ll implement quantization, batching, and high-efficiency runtimes (vLLM/TGI) to keep latency low.



On-Prem Deployment: Manage model stability on local GPU servers and multi-GPU setups, ensuring high availability for internal services.



Rapid R&D: Stay at the bleeding edge—test new papers, quantization methods, and training techniques as soon as they hit GitHub.



What we’re looking for

Core Python: Deep experience building the scripts and tooling that power AI pipelines.



Fine-Tuning Expertise: Practical experience using PEFT, LoRA, and QLoRA to steer model behavior.



Local Execution: You’ve spent significant time running models on your own hardware or dedicated instances (not just hitting an OpenAI endpoint).



Architecture Knowledge: A strong handle on tokenization, context management, and preparing high-quality datasets.



The AI Stack: Fluency in Hugging Face, PyTorch, and the Transformers library.



Hardware Proficiency: Experience navigating CUDA, managing VRAM constraints, and orchestrating multi-GPU environments.



Problem Solver: You can debug a failing training run and understand why a model is "hallucinating" or underperforming.



Nice to have

Generative Media: Experience with ComfyUI, Stable Diffusion, or video generation workflows.



Edge Inference: Knowledge of GGUF, AWQ, or running models via engines like Ollama.



Scale: Experience with distributed training or managing massive, multi-terabyte datasets.



Agents: A background in building autonomous AI agents or internal productivity tools.



Top 3 Skills to select on OnlineJobs for this role:

Python (Absolute must-have for the codebase).



Machine Learning (To capture the general AI talent pool).



PyTorch (This filters for people who understand the underlying math/frameworks).

description:

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Fully Flexible, $3,000-$5,000 / month)
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you complete it!)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: https://exchange-life-community.notion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f1855927780788969ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Full time career opportunity – diverse B2B/B2C Sales & Marketing role in consumer products – growing responsibilities
description:
A great long term career opportunity awaits a driven, agile, digital-savvy, hungry-to-learn individual who wants to take on growing responsibilities in sales and marketing for two exciting Australian consumer brands.

I own two established consumer brands (both have been around for over 50 years), historically operating in the wholesale space (800+ stockists). Over the last couple of years, the B2C channel has grown in importance and its simply too much workload for me to manage. 



Your workload would consist of 2-3 hours per day of operational support (processing of orders, data entry, creating shipping labels) and the majority of the day would be digital support projects (eg editing product images in Canva, generating AI images for digital ads, managing & optimising google ads, updating online marketplace listings on eBay, Iconic, Faire, Fieldfolio, Fruugo, Amazon) as well as responding to social media posts and posting pro-actively on social media (less than 2 hours per week).



You already have experience in Digital Sales Support, consider yourself a fast learner and self-starter who is willing to take on additional responsibilities to support all sales activity through all our sales channels. You have a can-do attitude and are comfortable handling multiple tasks simultaneously.



Advanced Microsoft office experience is required, including having previously managed websites and online marketplaces such as eBay and Amazon. You have significant experience using Shopify and have a good working knowledge with Canva and AI image generation. You have capability to manage SEO and Google Ads, and have some marketplace experience such as maintaining product listings on Amazon. Any challenges you face that are not defined by our procedures, you are willing to research yourself (eg youtube videos) to figure out how to do something. 



The role is fulltime with salary increases over time in line with increased responsibilities. Hours are Monday to Friday and we honor most Filipino holidays except for All Saints and All Souls Day. Once you complete your 6 months’ probation, you are eligible for a 13th month salary.



This is a fantastic full-time career opportunity and the owner of the business is willing to invest a lot of time into your development. As such, if you are only after a short-term contract or prefer to continue doing some gig-work on the side, this role is not for you.

title: E-commerce Virtual Assistant / Product Catalog Specialist (Magento 2 & Shopify)
description:
We are a growing e-commerce business based in Australia, specializing in a wide range of costumes (Halloween, Book Week, Oktoberfest, 1920s styles, etc.). We are running two separate websites—one on Shopify and one on Magento 2.

We are looking for a detail-oriented and experienced E-commerce Virtual Assistant to help us clean up our product catalogs, optimize our listings for SEO, and improve the overall shopping experience for our Australian customers.

Key Responsibilities:

• SEO Product Descriptions: Rewrite existing product descriptions to make them engaging, informative, and SEO-friendly. Strictly NO keyword stuffing. Focus on natural readability and high conversion. Experience with Semrush for keyword research is a huge plus.

• Meta Descriptions: Write compelling Meta Descriptions (under 160 characters) to improve click-through rates (CTR). Note: We do NOT use Meta Keywords, please skip them entirely.

• Image Optimization: Update and modify product "Size Chart" images (using Canva or Photoshop) to ensure they are clear, accurate, and consistent in style. Ensure all images have descriptive ALT text.

• Product Categorization: Reorganize and correctly tag/categorize products across both Magento 2 and Shopify platforms to make navigation easier for customers.

Requirements:

• MUST have hands-on experience with Magento 2. (If you only know Shopify, please do not apply).

• Strong experience managing Shopify stores.

• Excellent written English skills, with the ability to adapt to Australian English spelling (e.g., colour, centre).

• Basic graphic design skills (Canva or Photoshop) for resizing and editing size charts.

• Attention to detail and a strong understanding of on-page SEO best practices (Titles, Meta Descriptions, URL structures).

How to Apply:

To ensure you have read this job description carefully, please include the phrase "Aussie Costume Expert" at the very beginning of your application subject line. Applications without this phrase will be automatically deleted.

Please also include:

1. A brief summary of your experience with Magento 2.

2. An example or link to a product description you have written in the past.

3. Your expected hourly rate.

We look forward to working with you!

title: Accountant
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Accountant to join our team and help keep our finances clean, accurate, and compliant. You’ll be the go-to person for managing accounts, preparing reports, and making sure everything balances out. If you love numbers and enjoy looking at financial data, this role is for you.



Your Responsibilities:

• Handle day-to-day financial transactions.

• Reconciling general ledgers, bank statements and balance sheets.

• Analyzing financial data/documents and managing employee or business expenses.

• Prepare closing journal entries, adjustments and monthly Financial Schedules.

• Prepare financial statements for management, shareholders and tax reporting.

• Ensure compliance with accounting standards, company policies, legal and regulatory requirements, tax filing and documentation.

• Process payroll and managing payments, taxes and benefits.

• Organize and archive documents.

• Support CFO in budgeting, forecasting and financial planning.

• Collaborate with teams across the company in securing accurate documents and correct details.

• Conducting internal expense audits to check discrepancies.

• Maintaining internal controls and accounting systems to support accuracy and prevent fraud.

• Handle any related tasks relevant to job assigned by the management.



Who we’re looking for:

• Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy, Finance, or business-related field.

• Proven 3-5 years’ experience in full cycle accounting and bookkeeping.

• Experience in Tax Preparation and filing preferably in TaxAct.

• Strong, independent and confident to own the accounting end to end function.

• Proficient Accounting Software preferably Xero.

• Excellent Attention to details and organizational skills.

• Ability to communicate financial information clearly.



Nice to have:

• Have a CPA, CMA, CA certification or working toward it.

• Experience with US companies or clients.

• Experience in Financial Analysis and Financial Planning Reports.

• Proficient in Accounting, ERP, Payroll and Tax Software. (Gusto, Xero, Quickbooks,TaxAct etc.)



What We Can Offer

• A supportive team that values collaboration and improvement.

• Flexible schedule.

• Direct access to leadership for clarity and feedback.

• Opportunity to build, develop and take on more responsibility.

• Long term role and opportunity to a growing company.



If you believe you’re the right fit, please send your latest resume to 
 forget to include the word “Yield” in the subject line so we know you’ve read the full job description.

title: DTC Video Editor – Conversion-Focused Meta Ads (Ongoing)

What you'll be editing:

We provide full scripts, detailed creative briefs, and reference ads. Your job is to follow direction closely and deliver fast, punchy edits that sell.

This is not a one-off gig. If you're the right fit, this becomes a steady, ongoing partnership.



– Michael, BrightKidCo

title: Looking for a Reliable Customer Support Specialist
description:
Dear,



We run an eCommerce dropshipping business with multiple stores in different countries.



We are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those that consistently make a positive contribution to our company. We are seeking great candidates that will represent the company with great customer service and dedication.



So essentially this is a Customer Support job where you would have to follow a very clear process to keep our customers happy, but which will become very simple when you understand every step.



MUST HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF THESE PLATFORMS:



Shopify (eCommerce platform)

DeepL ( for translation)

ChatGPT



Gorgias

Hubstaff



Responsibilities:



Handling customer complaints.

Reporting on refunds/complaints.

Responding to customer
s regarding refunds, tracking numbers, FAQs.

Contributing to our documentation and improving our support processes.

Respond to all customer inquiries in a timely and accurate manner.

We maintain an ETA of 24 hours so you must reply to the
s within this timeframe.

Demonstrate a high level of professionalism at all times.



We will provide you with:



Video training

SOP to follow

Access to the Lead customer support to answer all your questions.



Applicant needs to:



Speak fluent English both written and verbally

Minimum 2 years of experience in Customer Support

Be available for weekly team calls

Must be organized, motivated, and willing to learn and grow.

Available to join immediately



Be available for a minimum of 10-40 hours per week once you are asked to start working.



Ideally, you'll have some experience with customer support, but ultimately we want to work with someone who loves helping people and is interested in handling customer support issues. I don't want any inconsistency in the
s exchanged with the customer. Example: twice the same
, imprecise answer, off-topic answer, etc.



Reply with ‘pizza’ if you want to apply



Please respond by telling me what similar experience you have had before and tell me why you think you are a good fit for this job!



I look forward to your proposal.



Thank you.

Reda

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:

As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
## Role



We’re hiring a Social Media Manager to own the strategy, coordination, and execution of social media distribution for some of the fastest-growing podcast brands on the internet. 



You will manage end-to-end social media execution across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, X, and LinkedIn, turning podcast episodes into high-performing content that drives millions of views.



You’ll work directly with high-profile entrepreneurs and founders who are building movements, not just audiences. You’ll collaborate closely with a world-class creative team and take real ownership of growth outcomes across multiple high-stakes brands. 



This role is ideal for someone who deeply understands social media, thinks in hooks and distribution, moves fast, and gets energy fro
asurable results.



## What You Own



You own the distribution, positioning, and performance of content once it is ready to publish. That means d
 what gets posted, how it is positioned, when it goes live, how it performs, and what to optimise next. You are accountable for outcomes, not production.



## Role Clarity (Important)



This is not an editing or graphic design role. You will not be editing videos or designing thumbnails. Your responsibility is to ensure content is ready to publish. This means being able to quickly spot spelling or factual errors, incorrect branding or tone, and visuals, thumbnails, or covers that are clearly off-standard. You are not responsible for detailed video QA, edit notes, or design iterations. Editors and designers own production quality.



## Responsibilities

Captioning & Hooks (AI-Assisted): Write click-worthy captions, hooks, and titles using AI and strategic thinking

Content Readiness Checks: Before publishing, confirm content is accurate, on-brand, and free from obvious errors.

Publishing & Scheduling: Upload, schedule, and publish content across YouTube, TikTok, Meta (FB & IG), X, and LinkedIn with zero mistakes.

Creative Awareness: Ensure YouTube thumbnails, IG covers, and episode graphics meet brand standards and are suitable for publishing.

Client Communication: Manage daily communication, approvals, and feedback with clients clearly and professionally.

Content & Trend Research: Track viral trends, analyse competitors, and pitch fresh content ideas weekly.

Performance Tracking: Monitor performance using Metricool and reporting tools to identify wins and optimisation opportunities.

Systems & Ops Support: Maintain clean 
 structures, update weekly distribution schedules, and keep workflows organised.



## Requirements

2+ years managing social media professionally with proven growth results.

Strong understanding of short-form and long-form content performance.

Strategic awareness of editing and design principles (hooks, pacing, thumbnails) without doing the work.

Experience with or familiarity in YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, X, LinkedIn, Canva (review and light adjustments only), ChatGPT or similar AI tools, Metricool or similar scheduling platforms.

Highly desired: 
, 
, podcast hosting platforms, transcription tools.

Data-driven mindset with attention to detail.

Native-level written English.

Reliable internet connection.

Available 8AM–5PM AEST.



## Results You’re Accountable For



Maintain a minimum 4% YouTube CTR.

100% on-time, error-free publishing.

Launch at least one successful new content format or growth experiment per client per quarter.

Maintain 95%+ client satisfaction.

Deliver weekly content ideas aligned with strategy and trends.

Produce monthly performance insights with clear next steps.

Maintain clean, predictable content systems.



## Compensation



Base Rate: $8–$10 AUD per hour, based on experience and results.



Performance Bonuses

Monthly Views Bonus

Viral Content Bonus

Quarterly Performance Bonus

Quarterly Innovation Bonus

World-Class Training: Access to elite marketing education and weekly growth sessions.



## Working With Us



We move fast, hold high standards, and expect ownership. This is not a passive role. You are trusted to think, d
, and execute. If you want comfort and predictability, this isn’t it. If you want growth, responsibility, and real impact, you’ll thrive here.



## How to Apply



Resume including links to accounts you’ve grown and clear metrics.



Send a 60-second video pitch covering why your right for the role. This MUST be custom tailored to our business. Your video pitch replaces a cover letter.

title: PV (pharmacovigilance) Clinical Trial case processing experience (need 25 VA's)
description:
The Pharmacovigilance Associate is a fully WFH role and is responsible for the intake, processing, and management of safety cases arising from clinical trials. This role focuses on accurate documentation, evaluation, and reporting of adverse events in compliance with global pharmacovigilance regulations, study protocols, and company procedures.



Essential Functions:

• Perform case intake, triage, and data entry of adverse events, serious adverse events, and SUSARs from clinical trial sources

• Process safety cases in accordance with regulatory guidelines, study protocols, and internal standard operating procedures

• Review and interpret source documents including CIOMS forms, MedWatch reports, investigator communications, and clinical trial documentation

• Conduct medical review of cases and perform causality and expectedness assessments based on investigator reports and protocol requirements

• Perform case follow up with investigators or study teams to obtain missing information and ensure data completeness

• Manage safety queries and ensure timely resolution of case discrepancies

• Prepare and submit expedited safety reports to regulatory authorities, ethics committees, and investigators within required timelines

• Maintain accurate documentation and ensure compliance with global pharmacovigilance standards and reporting regulations





Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Experience in pharmacovigilance case processing within clinical trials

• Strong understanding of adverse event reporting, serious adverse events, and SUSAR reporting requirements

• Familiarity with global safety reporting regulations and clinical trial safety procedures

• Experience reviewing clinical safety documentation such as CIOMS and MedWatch forms

• Strong attention to detail and ability to meet strict regulatory timelines



Safety Database Experience:

• Argus Safety

• ARISg

• PV Edge

• Preferred experience with Veeva Vault Safety and EDC databases



Education:

• Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, or related field preferred.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your intro video and updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: System Administrator/IT
description:
The System Administrator is a full time WFH role and should maintain a high functional understanding of critical business systems, architectures, and security mechanisms and work to ensure these align with business operations, security, and regulatory concerns. Administrators will work directly with core systems, provide guidance, training, and documentation for use by all levels of staff, and support or create directives to ensure proper use of systems through the entire system lifecycle. The Administrator should also possess a strong understanding of helpdesk operations and be able to support those operations directly and indirectly.





Essential Functions:

• Maintain essential IT infrastructure, including operating systems, security tools, applications, servers,
 systems, laptops, desktops, software, and hardware.

• Support Helpdesk operations with ticket escalation support, and by providing training and documentation as needed. Liaise with Senior Management on relevant technical issues, ongoing problems and high impact issues. Provide root cause analysis and propose, plan, and implement solutions. Communicate with End-User community to ensure awareness of changing infrastructure, workflows, potential issues, and their solutions.

• Work with InfoSec, Validation, QA and other IT-adjacent functions to ensure infrastructure meets SOP, Security and Compliance guidelines. 

• Configure monitoring and alerting mechanisms for system and endpoint baselines, disposition, and compliance.

• Maintain awareness of new and changing business goals and objectives by attending relevant meetings and provide solutions to meet these goals.



Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Lead projects that require directing the work of others and with some latitude on actions or decisions. 

• Manage timelines and resources and may lead implementation efforts to completion. 

• Exhibits in-depth knowledge of organization and relationships (formal and informal).

• Interprets and communicates information, ideas, and instruction. 

• Uses persuasion and negotiation to build cooperation and consensus towards decisions. 

• Translates advanced technical issues into understandable terms for non-technical users.

• Works on assignments that are typical for an administrative office setting. 

• Has the ability to recognize and suggest an improvement for situations that deviate from accepted practice; seeks managerial advice before acting. 

• Errors may seriously impact other tea
mbers or departmental functions and their ability to meet deadlines. 

Self-motivated; ability to create and manage short- and long-term projects, goals and objectives, and delegate as needed. 



Position Requirements:

Education: Bachelor’s Degree or its International Equivalent in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technologies, or Related Field.

Preferred Job-related Experience: Eight (8) or more years of experience providing end-user phone support for current PC desktop and application software OR installing, upgrading, troubleshooting, and repairing various devices in a network environment. Experience installing, configuring, and maintaining business- and enterprise-level systems, platforms, and solutions.

Additional Eligibility Qualifications: Advanced skills in MS Office Suite (Word, Outlook, Excel PowerPoint, etc.) and data entry/accounting systems required.

Preferences: Prior work experience in a non-governmental organization (NGO) preferred. 



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your intro video and updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: End Card Designer (Weekly)
description:
Role Overview Viasox is seeking a creative and detail-oriented designer to produce high-quality end cards on a weekly basis. Send your CV to danny at viasox dot com with subject line: End Card Designer (Weekly).



What You Will Do

Weekly Deliverables: You will create a minimum of 5 new end card concepts per product per week. Total: 15 end card concepts per week



Format Flexibility: Every end card must be delivered in 9x16 vertical format 

Dynamic vs. Static: The end cards need to be provided as either high-resolution images (9x16) or animated GIFs. 

Iteration & Testing: You will work closely with the Creative team to iterate on winning concepts.

Develop creative concepts and write copy for the end cards (with guidance from the Viasox team).



Goal of the Role:

Your job is to design end cards that increase ad click-through rates and conversions by clearly presenting the product, offer, and call-to-action.



Revisions & Feedback

The Creative team will review submissions weekly and may request revisions or iterations to meet standards. Communication will be done through slack.



The 3 Core Products

Your primary focus will be creating end cards for our three flagship product lines:



Viasox EasyStretch™ Socks: Ultra-stretchy, non-binding socks with triple-padded cushioning designed to fit comfortably on legs of all sizes while providing all-day comfort without tightness or pressure.

More info found here: 







Viasox Compression Socks (Knee-High): Knee-high socks with gentle graduated compression (about 12–15 mmHg) that help improve circulation, reduce swelling, and support legs throughout the day

More info here: 





Viasox Ankle Compression Socks: Ankle compression socks that deliver uniform 14 mmHg pressure around the foot and ankle to help improve circulation, reduce swelling, and provide supportive comfort during daily activities

More info here 





What are End Cards:

An end card is the final visual screen shown after an ad video finishes, typically featuring the product, brand logo, key offer, and a large call-to-action button (like “Shop Now”), designed to clearly prompt the viewer to click and go to the website.



Examples: 

Examples 2: Different Types Of Endcards









Viasox Current End Cards Examples:







Use this to view HTML examples:







End Card Best Practices

Technical Requirements

Format: 9:16 vertical

Resolution: 1080 × 1920 pixels minimum

File types: PNG, JPG, or GIF

Max file size: under 5MB

Safe area: Keep important text within the center 70% of the frame (top/bottom may crop on some devices)

Required Elements for Every End Card

Each end card should include:

Viasox logo

Product image / images

Key benefit or promotion

Call-to-action button (Shop Now, Get Yours, Claim Offer, etc.)

Clear visual hierarchy

Optional elements:

Customer reviews

Star ratings

Movement cues (arrows, pulsing buttons)



Creative Direction

End cards should feel:

Clean and modern

Product-focused

Easy to understand instantly

Designed for mobile viewing





Avoid:

cluttered layouts

small text

overly complex designs





The viewer should understand the product + benefit + action within 1–2 seconds.

title: Home Care Recruiter
description:
About Us



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in America. We believe in creating a true partnership where our employees act and feel like a true member of the American team they are matched with. Our goal is to help them create a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for their clients and their families. To achieve this, we’re looking for a Helper Hero to join our team and help us shine even brighter!



About You



What sets us apart is YOU. You’re not just any virtual tea
mber—you’re a Helper Hero! If you’re passionate about making a difference, have a knack for organization, and thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, you’re who we are looking for. If you’re the kind of person who loves tackling behind-the-scenes tasks with a smile, ensuring that our clients' caregivers and clients receive the best possible support, apply today!



Job Overview



We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Recruiter to support recruitment, caregiver

onboarding, and administrative tasks for a growing home care business. This role is

ideal for someone with experience in healthcare recruitment and a passion for

streamlining operations. You will work closely with the owner to alleviate their workload,

enabling them to focus on business growth and client care.



Key Responsibilities



1. Recruitment & Onboarding:



- Manage end-to-end caregiver recruitment: screen applicants, schedule interviews, and coordinate orientation/training.

- Process onboarding documentation via ADP Workforce (e.g., electronic I-9s, employee handbook distribution).

- Track and ensure completion of state-mandated caregiver training (e.g.,via Active Insights).



2. Administrative Support



- Answer inbound calls during peak hours and manage voi
s/lead inquiries.

- Assist with client intake calls and referral source coordination.

- Provide general administrative support (e.g., scheduling, data entry).



3. Systems & Collaboration



- Utilize platforms like WellSky or Axiscare (training provided) to streamline workflows.

- Collaborate with the owner to refine processes and maintain organization.



Qualifications:



- Excellent written/verbal communication (fluent English).

- Strong organizational and time-management abilities.

- Proficiency with CRM systems,
 management, and cloud-based tools (e.g., Google Drive).

- Proactive mindset—anticipate needs before they arise.

- Proven experience in recruitment, specifically in healthcare or home care staffing. 

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build rapport with candidates and tea
mbers.

- Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a fast-paced environment.

- Familiarity with recruitment platforms and CRM tools

- A positive attitude, sense of humor, and a passion for helping others.



Attributes of a Successful Helper Hero:



- Empathy: You genuinely care about people and want to make a difference in their lives.

- Organization: You’re a master of multitasking and can keep everything running smoothly.

- Communication: You speak impeccable English. You’re a clear and friendly communicator, both written and verbal.

- Problem Solver: You can see the big picture when resolving complex issues and follow through until you reach full resolution.

- Self Starter: You work effectively without supervision and follow processes precisely.

- Reliability: You’re dependable, punctual, and always ready to step up when needed.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us:



- Competitive Base Pay: $6.50/hr for the first 6 months. (Among the highest in the homecare industry)

- Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best

care possible.

- Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for

advancement and learning.

- Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration,

compassion, and a good laugh.



Ready to Be a Hero?



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated,

have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more

compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s

make a difference together.



IMPORTANT:  Directly apply and send your resume on our website:

Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: E-commerce Virtual Assistant for Jewelry Brand (Etsy, eBay, Amazon + Marketing)
description:
-> About Us  

We are a growing online jewelry brand specializing in Silver, 10K, 14K, and 18K gold jewelry set with moissanite and lab grown diamonds. Our customers look for high quality, elegant pieces with transparent, ethical sourcing. We sell on multiple platforms and are expanding our online presence.



We are looking for a long term, professional Virtual Assistant to help manage and grow our stores and brand.

 

Role Overview  

You will manage day to day operations on Etsy, eBay, and Amazon, help set up and optimize accounts on additional marketplaces, and support marketing and social media content. This is a remote, part-time role to start, with the potential to grow into full-time based on performance.



-> Key Responsibilities  



-:E-commerce store management (Etsy, eBay, Amazon)-:  

- Create, optimize, and maintain product listings (titles, descriptions, tags/keywords, categories, variations, pricing).  

- Upload and organize product photos and product specs (metal type, karat, stone type, size, weight, etc.).  

- Monitor and update inventory, stock levels, and pricing across platforms.  

- Assist with order management: checking orders, tracking, coordinating with us on fulfillment issues.  

- Help with account setup and optimization on new platforms (e.g., Walmart, Shopify, TikTok Shop, or others we d
).



-:Customer service-:  

- Respond to customer inquiries and messages professionally and on time.  

- Help manage returns, exchanges, and order issues according to our policies.  

- Request feedback/reviews where allowed by platform rules.



-:Marketing & social media-:  

- Create basic marketing content for our jewelry (post ideas, captions, simple graphics using Canva or similar tools).  

- Schedule and publish posts on platforms like Instagram,
, Pinterest, and possibly TikTok.  

- Assist with simple campaigns and promotions (seasonal sales, new collection launches).  

- Help with basic research and ideas for influencer collaborations or partnerships.



-:Reporting & admin-:  

- Prepare simple weekly reports on sales, listing performance, and key metrics.  

- Maintain spreadsheets / Google Sheets with product data, SKUs, and listing links.  

- Document processes and help improve workflows over time.



-> Requirements  



-:Must?have-:  

- Proven experience managing Etsy and at least one of: eBay or Amazon (please provide store links or examples).  

- Strong written English with clear, professional communication.  

- Experience creating and optimizing product listings (SEO keywords, attractive titles, clear descriptions).  

- Comfortable using tools like Google Sheets, Google Drive, and Canva (or similar).  

- Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently and meet deadlines.  

- High attention to detail, especially with product information (sizes, metals, stones, variations).



-:Nice to have (bonus)-:  

- Experience working with jewelry brands (silver, gold, gemstones, moissanite, or lab-grown diamonds).  

- Basic understanding of jewelry terms (karat vs carat, stone shapes, settings, etc.).  

- Experience with simple ad tools (Etsy Ads, Amazon PPC, Meta/Instagram ads).  

- Familiarity with additional marketplaces (Walmart, TikTok Shop, Shopify, etc.).  

- Experience with basic analytics (reading listing stats and using data to improve performance).



-> Working Hours & Compensation  

- Starting: 10–20 hours per week (can increase based on performance and business growth).  

- Preferred time zone overlap: at least 2–3 hours overlap with Los Angeles [PST].  

- Rate: Starting at -:US$3–5 per hour-:, depending on experience and skills.



-> How to Apply  

Please send

1. A short introduction about yourself and your experience with Etsy, eBay, and/or Amazon.  

2. Links or screenshots of 2–3 product listings you created or managed (any niche; jewelry is a plus).  

3. A brief example: Take any one jewelry item you like (for example, “14K gold moissanite engagement ring”) and write:  

   - A product title.  

   - 3–5 bullet points for the description.  

   - 10–15 target keywords/tags you would use on Etsy.  

4. Your expected hourly rate within US$3–5/hour, your available hours per week, and your time zone.

title: Operations Manager
description:
Evolve Property Partners is a fast-growing short-term lettings and Airbnb management company. We manage a high-performing portfolio of properties and operate with a fully remote team of Virtual Assistants across Guest Services, Maintenance, and Claims. Our systems are built, our processes are documented, and our standards are high. We are now looking for the right person to own the operations and lead the team.



This is not a role where you will be building from scratch. The foundations are already in place. What we need is a sharp, accountable operator who can take those systems, run them at a high level, and hold a team of 7 VAs to the standard the business demands.



The Role



As Head of Operations, you sit between the Managing Director and the VA team. You are responsible for the daily running of the entire operation, ensuring every guest query is handled, every maintenance issue is resolved, every claim is raised, and every new property is onboarded without delay.



You will manage, audit, and develop a team of 7 Virtual Assistants across four specialist areas: Morning Guest Services, Evening Guest Services, Maintenance, and Claims & Onboarding. You will be the person who ensures the team is performing to standard every single day not just checking boxes, but genuinely driving quality.



What You Will Be Doing Day-to-Day



Staff Auditing and Performance Management is at the heart of this role. Every day you will conduct structured audits of the morning and evening VA shifts, reviewing guest communications across Airbnb, 
, Uplisting, and WhatsApp to ensure the 0 Inbox Rule is met and every response is professional and resolved. You will submit a Staff Feedback Form for each VA daily, logging performance, errors, corrections, and wins. Where standards slip, you correct them immediately and follow up.



Maintenance Oversight is a core daily responsibility. You will run a daily review meeting with the Maintenance VA, working through Breezeway to ensure no tickets are stagnant, urgent jobs are prioritised, and all completed work is evidenced with photos and clear notes. You will also submit a daily Breezeway performance report to the Managing Director.



Claims and Revenue Protection falls under your remit. You will oversee the Claims Specialist, auditing daily claims to ensure damages are correctly identified, fully evidenced, and submitted accurately. You will also spot-check new maintenance tickets for missed claim opportunities, ensuring no revenue is left on the table.



Onboarding and Offboarding of properties is managed through you. You will track every unit moving through the onboarding pipeline (documents, compliance, staging, photography, listing setup) and ensure each stage is progressing without delay. You will manage offboarding units through to final handover, coordinating with landlords and minimising financial risk.



Daily Reporting to the Managing Director is non-negotiable. You will submit a concise End of Day report each evening covering guest performance, reviews, claims, maintenance, and any key risks or escalations — giving the directors complete visibility with minimal involvement.



What We Are Looking For



Requirement



- Short-Term Lettings Experience

- You must have hands-on experience managing Airbnbs or short-term lettings. You understand check-in urgency, review management, and guest expectations.

- You have managed remote teams or VAs before. You know how to audit work, give direct feedback, and hold people accountable through data.

- You are comfortable working within established systems and processes. You do not need to build from scratch — you need to execute and improve.

- Experience with Uplisting, Breezeway, Airbnb, 
, Asana, and Slack is highly desirable.

Attention to Detail

- You catch what others miss: a late response, a missing photo, an unraised claim. You do not let things slide.

Decision Maker

- When a contractor fails to show or a guest escalates, you make a decision and solve the problem. You do not wait to be told.



The Opportunity



This role comes with a clear and genuine path to Operations Director. As the portfolio grows and you demonstrate your ability to run the operation at a high level, the expectation is that you step into a senior leadership position with greater strategic responsibility, team expansion, and increased compensation.



We are not looking for someone to fill a seat. We are looking for someone who wants to own a department, grow with the business, and become a key part of how Evolve Property Partners scales.

title: Video Editor (TikTok & Meta Ads)
description:
LOCATION: Remote 

TYPE: Hourly or Monthly Retainer 

SOFTWARE: CapCut (Desktop or Mobile)



ABOUT GLACR We are looking for a sharp, efficiency-driven Video Editor to join the GLACR creative team. We don’t just make "videos", we create high-performance Direct Response ads that convert. You will work directly with our Creative Strategist to turn raw footage and briefs into scroll-stopping ads for TikTok and Meta.



*THE ROLE & WORKFLOW:*

We value volume and speed, but not at the expense of organization. You will be provided with raw footage (influencer content, product shots) and clear briefs. Your job is to assemble them into winning creatives.



*YOUR WEEKLY OUTPUT:* 

We operate on a structured system to keep things efficient. You are NOT building 30 videos from scratch.



- 3 Batches per week.



- 3 Concepts per batch (9 unique core edits total).



- 3–4 Variations per concept (Swapping the "Hook," changing the visual angle, or text overlays).



Total Output: ~30 Ad deliverables per week.



*WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR*



- Experience: Minimum 2 years of video editing experience.



- Platform Native: You live and breathe TikTok/Reels. You understand the trends, the pacing, and the "native" feel.



- CapCut Expert: You are extremely fast and proficient in CapCut.



- Direct Response Mindset: You understand Hooks, Retention, and CTAs. You know that the first 3 seconds are the most important part of the video.



- Language: Capable of editing assets in both English and Swedish (we provide the translations, you handle the timing and placement).



- Communication: You are clear and proactive. If a deadline is at risk or a file is missing, you let us know immediately.



*REQUIREMENTS*



- Ability to follow detailed creative briefs.



- Highly organized file management (handling 30 exports a week requires structure).



- Fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality.



HOW TO APPLY Please send your application with the following:



Portfolio: A link to your work.



*Specific Examples:*

Please highlight 3 specific TikTok/Meta ads you have edited that demonstrate strong hooks and direct response principles.



Rate: Your preferred hourly rate or monthly retainer expectation.



*NOTE:*

Selected candidates will be asked to complete a small paid test task as the final step of the interview process.

title: Professional LinkedIn Outreach Specialist
description:
The Role

We are looking for a highly strategic, results-driven LinkedIn Outreach Specialist to join our team at Penji. Your primary mission is simple but challenging: turn cold LinkedIn connections into booked calendar meetings and drive our growth forward.

We don't want someone who just clicks "connect" and relies on generic, automated spam. We need a skilled conversationalist who understands B2B networking, knows how to bypass the noise, and can build immediate, authentic rapport with our target audience.



Your Key Objectives (The KPIs)

You are coming in to solve a specific problem: filling our pipeline. Your success will be measured by:

• Scheduling 10 Qualified Demos Per Week: This is your primary North Star. Every action you take should drive toward this number.

• Maintaining an Exceptionally High Response Rate: We set our standards aggressively high. While our ultimate stretch goal is a 50% response rate, we know that requires world-class execution. Your mandate is to ruthlessly A/B test, refine targeting, and optimize copy to push our metrics to the absolute limit.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Targeted Prospecting: Identify and build lists of highly qualified leads on LinkedIn.

• Outbound Messaging: Craft personalized, engaging connection requests and follow-up sequences.

• Inbox Management & Triage: Handle responses dynamically. Overcome objections, answer initial questions, and seamlessly pivot conversations toward a booked demo.

• Iterative Optimization: You will be expected to test, tweak, and figure out the exact messaging angles that convert our specific audience. You own the process.



Who You Are

• Experienced: You have a proven track record of booking B2B meetings specifically through LinkedIn outreach.

• A Strategic Thinker: You don't need hand-holding. You know how to take an aggressive goal and figure out the "how" to get there.

• Copywriting Sharpness: You know how to write concise, punchy messages that get decision-makers to actually hit "reply."

• Fluent in English: Excellent written communication skills with a firm grasp of a professional, conversational business tone.



How to Apply

(Magic Phrase: conversational)

To ensure your application stands out:

1. Complete the application form:

2 . Attach your portfolio or relevant work samples.

title: Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)
description:
JOB TITLE:

Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a digital marketing agency that works with service-based businesses (medspas, home services, fitness, legal, etc.), primarily in the US market. We're looking for a full-time Video Editor & Graphic Designer who can create scroll-stopping content across multiple formats.



You'll be our go-to creative person — editing short-form videos for social media, producing ad creatives for Meta and Google campaigns, and designing graphics for our clients' brands. You'll also work with AI tools like HeyGen and ElevenLabs to produce AI-generated video and voiceover content.



This isn't a "just cut clips together" role. You'll be creating content that directly drives leads and sales for real businesses, so you need to understand what makes people stop scrolling, click, and take action.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) — fast-paced, hook-driven, optimized for engagement

-Create video ads for Meta and Google campaigns (direct response style)

-Produce client deliverables such as testimonial videos, promo videos, and brand content

-Use AI video/voice tools (HeyGen, ElevenLabs) to create and enhance content

-Design static graphics — social media posts, ad creatives, thumbnails, banners

-Collaborate with our team on content strategy and creative direction

-Maintain consistent quality and meet turnaround deadlines



REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 2 years of experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-Strong graphic design skills (Canva Pro at minimum; Photoshop/Illustrator is a plus)

-Experience editing short-form, direct-response, or social media content (not just vlogs or cinematic edits)

-Familiarity with AI content tools — HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar platforms

-Good eye for typography, color, and layout

-Understands hooks, pacing, and what performs well on social platforms

-Reliable internet connection and able to work during reasonable overlap hours

-Can manage multiple projects and hit deadlines without constant follow-up



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required, But a Big Plus):

-Experience designing or building landing pages (using tools like GoHighLevel, WordPress, Unbounce, or similar)

-Background working in or with a digital marketing agency

-Basic understanding of paid ads and what makes a creative convert

-Motion graphics or animation skills



COMPENSATION:

-Full-time position

-Salary is open and negotiable based on your experience and skill level

-Long-term role with room to grow as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY:



Important: To make sure you actually read this post, please start your application with the word "Creative" — applications that don't include this will be skipped.



In your application, include:



-A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

-Links to your portfolio or samples of your work (video edits, graphics, landing pages if applicable)

-Which AI tools you've used and how you've used them

-Your expected monthly salary (in USD)

-Your availability to start



We review every application that follows these instructions. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: AI VIDEO / IMAGE EDITOR - (500 USD P/M - 6 USD P/H)
description:
We are seeking a skilled AI Video Editor for our vacuum compression backpack brand, active in the Big 5 countries: US, CA, GB, NZ, and AU. We are scaling quickly and need someone to elevate our creative process for further growth.



Ideally, we seek long-term tea
mbers with strong growth opportunities for consistent contributors. Attention to detail is key—mention the word "One" at the top of your application to prove you've read this. We want candidates who can elevate our creative output.



About the Role

You'll create high-converting video ads for Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, and other social platforms that drive clicks and purchases.



We're testing angles and formats like problem/solution, testimonials, visual storytelling, and us vs. them, pack-with-me — across multiple platforms and placements. You'll receive brand assets, product images, angle concepts, and copywriting.



Onboarding includes training on brand identity, creative styling (which you can improve), and customer personas from our AeroGo Brand Identity document.



What Sets This Role Apart

You must be proficient with AI video tools like VEED AI, Runway, HeyGen, or Mootion to generate fresh, unique ad creatives aligned with angles and copy.



Your creative opinions are valued — ideas to improve ad concepts, visuals, or copywriting are always welcome.



What We're Looking For

Experience creating video ads for Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and similar platforms — especially for e-commerce



Deep understanding of platform-native formats: Reels, Stories, TikTok feed, Shorts (vertical, fast-paced, hook-driven)



Eye for direct-response design: strategic and conversion-focused, not just aesthetically pleasing



Strong AI video creation skills to produce unique visuals matching our premium AeroGo brand



Ability to deliver multiple iterations for A/B testing, optimized for each placement and platform



Understanding of TikTok trends, hooks, and pacing to create native-feeling content that converts



Proficiency in English, written and spoken



This position is paid by the hour, with full-time hours available. Open to part-time start for the perfect fit.



Please respond with your relevant experience, a visible portfolio of video ads across Meta, TikTok, and other platforms (including AI-generated work), and your weekly availability in hours. EXPERIENCE WITH AI VIDEO GENERATION IS A MUST — show your AI portfolio!



I look forward to your proposal and application.



Thank you.



Satish
