title: Amazon Client Success Manager (Full-Service Amazon Agency)
description:
About Us



We are a growing Amazon-focused agency working primarily with supplement brands in the US market. We provide full-service Amazon growth including PPC management, listing optimization, creative coordination, catalog management, and strategic guidance.



We are building a structured, professional team and are looking for a full-time Client Success Manager to help manage client relationships and coordinate internal execution.



This is a long-term role with strong growth potential.



Role Overview



As our Amazon Client Success Manager, you will be the main point of contact for assigned clients. You will coordinate between our PPC, creative, and operations teams to ensure smooth execution and clear communication.



You are not expected to execute PPC campaigns or create designs. Your role is to manage workflow, ensure quality, and maintain client satisfaction.



You must be confident communicating with US-based clients via Zoom and
.



Key Responsibilities



- Client Communication

- Lead weekly client updates

- Host and lead Zoom calls with clients

- Send performance summaries and action plans

- Manage client expectations professionally



Account Coordination



- Review account performance weekly

- Assign tasks to PPC, creative, and operations teams

- Ensure deadlines are met

- Follow internal SOPs

- Performance Monitoring

- Understand and interpret Amazon KPIs (ACOS, TACOS, ROAS, CVR, CTR, etc.)

- Identify performance drops and escalate when needed

- Prepare structured weekly and monthly reports



Quality Assurance



- Review listing updates before they are submitted

- Ensure creatives match briefs

- Ensure PPC updates follow strategy

-

Internal Collaboration



- Work closely with manager and department specialists

- Participate in weekly internal meetings

- Help improve systems and workflows



Required Qualifications



- 2+ years experience working with Amazon Seller Central accounts

- Experience working with US-based brands

- Strong written and spoken English

- Comfortable leading Zoom calls

- Experience preparing performance reports

- Strong organizational skills

- Ability to manage multiple accounts at once

- Familiarity with PPC terminology



Preferred



- Agency experience

- Experience managing 5+ Amazon accounts simultaneously

- Experience with supplements or health products

- Experience using ClickUp, Asana, or similar tools



What This Role Is NOT



- This is not a PPC specialist role.

- This is not a graphic design role.

- This is not a product research role.



This is a client-facing coordination and management position.



Work Details



- Full-time (40 hours per week)

- Remote

- Must overlap at least 4 hours with US business hours

- Long-term position



Growth Opportunity



- As the agency grows, this role can evolve into Senior Account Manager and eventually Head of Client Success.



- We are building a long-term team.



How To Apply (IMPORTANT)



- Send your resume

- use term "Success" in subject line

- Please answer the following questions carefully in your message:

    - Explain the difference between ACOS and TACOS.

    - If a client’s sales dropped 30% week-over-week, what steps would you take before speaking with them?

    - How would you structure a weekly client performance update?

    - How many Amazon accounts have you managed at one time?

    - Have you led Zoom calls with clients? Describe your experience.

    - What tools have you used to manage Amazon accounts?

    - Why are you interested in this role?

title: Senior Accountant
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

The Accounting Senior will manage the accounting and finance needs for multiple clients. You will work

with a diverse group of businesses and families to ensure they are taken care of and positioning each for

ultimate financial success.

Our focus is on building strong relationships with our clients and becoming their go-to accounting and

tax advisor.



ROLES & RESPONSIBILITIES

• Manage the daily bookkeeping and accounting tasks for clients

• Daily AP, AR, Payroll, bank reconciliations, adjusting journal entries

• Record financial transactions and prepare monthly account reconciliations

• Analyze and review monthly financial statements and prepare additional reports

• Complete and manage various accounting related projects for multiple clients

• Available to work between the normal business day (ex. 9am to 5pm US Miami Time) so that

you can be responsive to requests.



REQUIREMENTS

• 2+ years working in public accounting or bookkeeping firm

• Computer and monitors and strong internet connection

• Dedicated office space, free of distractions

• High degree of comfort with technology and remote work environment

• Ability to learn new online software and comfortable using technology in general, including

video chat software,
, spreadsheets, Microsoft apps, etc.

• Enjoy the fast-pace personality of entrepreneurial business people and a fast growing startups

• Ability to operate independently with minimal daily direction from manager



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:

• CPA

• University Degree in Accounting

• Prior experience with QuickBooks Online, Sage Intacct, 
, and Ramp

• Prior experience working with small businesses, entrepreneurs, startups, or family offices

• 1 year of remote work experience

title: Seeking Experts for Feedback:Bilingual Parents, and Sport Enthusiasts (Basketball Book Focus)
description:
Looking for Beta Readers: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids"



Hello!!!



We’re a growing educational publishing team at Petite Dreamer, creating "human-crafted," engaging books for children—especially those in multilingual and multicultural families who may find traditional books boring. Right now, we’re looking for thoughtful experts and beta readers to provide detailed feedback on our newest title: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids: 24 Epic Tales of Grit".



We are especially interested in those with a passion for basketball, any sports and personal or professional experience in coaching, sports education, or children's literature.



???? About the Book:



Beyond the Stats: Unlike typical sports books that focus on dry numbers, this book focuses on "Grit"—the failures, heartbreaks, and the "4 AM" workouts that make a champion.



Epic Tales of Grit: Features 24 stories of basketball G.O.A.T.s, including Kobe Bryant’s "Mamba Mentality," Larry Bird’s early morning repetitions, and Michael Jordan's "Breakfast Club".



Engaging Format: Includes 100+ facts, trivia, "Grit Checks," and interactive quizzes designed to grab the attention of reluctant readers.



Multilingual Support: Written to support bilingual/multilingual households and encourage "Future Legends" at home.



???? We’re looking for someone who:



Has experience writing professional feedback or editorial content for children's books.



Can provide constructive insights that resonate with parents, educators, and young sports fans.



Understands the value of resilience-based non-fiction for kids.



Has experience as a teacher, bilingual parent, or a deep background in the Sport(basketball,Football) niche (coach, player, or super-fan).



? Bonus if you:



Have personal experience teaching or parenting bilingual children.



Have written or edited children’s sports books or educational non-fiction.



Are familiar with the "Mamba Mentality" or the history of SPort, basketball, Football(NFL) legends.



???? What You’ll Get:



A full PDF copy of the book in advance.



An opportunity to join our growing team of collaborators (with potential future projects across stories, facts, trivia books, and more).



How to Apply:

Please send a brief summary of your experience with Sport, basketball and children’s education/literature. Mention if you are a bilingual parent or educator!

title: Human resource administer
description:
MAIN OBJECTIVES: 

Ensuring the delivery of superior service levels to our internal customers, the HR Administrator will be responsible for the administration processes within the HR function, including but not limited to; Monthly Payroll changes; the onboarding process, management of leavers, the recruitment lifecycle and training administration. The HR Administrator will also be responsible for preparing weekly and monthly reporting. 



MAIN DUTIES: 



Administration: 



Drafting of employment documents e.g. offer letters, employment agreements, amendments to terms and conditions of employment, end of employment confirmation letters. 



Ensure all appointments, promotions, probationary reviews, transfers are done as per company procedures. 



Ensure HR systems e.g. employee records, holiday and sickness absence management systems are maintained and up to date. 



Manage the new joiners and leavers process: creating and maintaining employee files, requesting new joiner
 and IT accounts and ensuring the leavers process is completed in a timely manner. 



Sustain all employee files and ensure they are maintained and updated in accordance with The PE Group. 



Payroll administration; preparing the monthly payroll inputting sheet submissions, new starters and leavers and any other payroll amendments which will be submitted to the HR Manager for sign off. 



Recruitment:



Keep the recruitment database up-to-date; recording all incoming CVs received, updating/keeping track of candidate progress. 



Assist with all aspects of the recruitment process, from advertising vacancies to arranging interview schedules, carrying out interviews with hiring managers, rejection letters/emails and initiating onboarding screening checks for successful applicants. 



Liaise with management for the new joiner’s corporate induction to ensure all new employees feel not only welcome but important. 



Others: 



Manage the HR training database, updating all employee training records. 



Assist with ad-hoc HR tasks/projects and general office administration when required 



Perform any other task as directed by the HR Manager, and the CEO 



EDUCATION & TRAINING: 



Ideally educated to degree level or demonstrable relevant experience 



• CIPD Level 3 qualified 



 EXPERIENCE & SKILLS: 



• A minimum of 1 year’s HR generalist experience. 



• Exceptional interpersonal, communication and customer service skills. 



• Experience of dealing with a high level of administration/coordination. 



• Good Microsoft Office skills, intermediate Excel will be considered an advantage. 



• Process driven with excellent attention to detail. 



• Strong communication skills; the ability to communicate confidently with a range of internal and external stakeholders. 



• Good time management. The ability to prioritise your own workload and meet deadlines. 



KEY RELATIONSHIPS 



• All staff 



• Potential candidates 



• Training providers 



• Recruitment agencies 



• Outsourced payroll company 



 



CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION: 



The job holder will have access to employee files and profiles, payroll data and other sensitive information therefore confidentiality and integrity are key to this role.

title: Home Care - Caregiver Scheduler
description:
About Us



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home

care agencies in the U.S. We believe in true partnership where our virtual assistants act

as an extension of the care team. Our goal is to ensure a compassionate, innovative,

and efficient care experience for clients and families alike.



About You



What sets us apart is YOU. If you’re passionate about making a difference, have a knack for organization, and

thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, you’re who we are looking for. If

you’re the kind of person who loves tackling behind-the-scenes tasks with a smile,

ensuring that our clients and caregivers receive the best possible support, apply today!



About the Role



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Home Care Scheduler to match caregivers with client

visits, fill open shifts fast, and keep the daily schedule smooth. You’ll work closely with

recruiters, care managers, clients, and caregivers to make sure every visit is covered and

logged correctly.



Key Responsibilities



- Build, publish, and maintain daily/weekly schedules for caregivers and clients

- Fill open shifts quickly by calling, texting, and following up with caregivers

- Match caregivers based on skills, availability, location, client preferences, and pay

rates

- Monitor call-outs, late arrivals, and no-shows; arrange immediate coverage and

notify stakeholders

- Confirm new starts, schedule changes, and cancellations with clients and

caregivers

- Update client and caregiver profiles, care plans, and visit notes in the scheduling

system

- Track EVV/clock-ins and resolve exceptions before billing and payroll cutoffs

- Coordinate with recruiters and team leads to forecast coverage needs

- Escalate risks (missed visits, repeated call-outs, client concerns) early

- Provide end-of-day and end-of-week coverage reports and metrics

- (If needed) Support after-hours/on-call rotation for urgent schedule changes



Qualifications



-1+ year of scheduling, dispatch, coordination, or call center experience (specifically in home

care, home health, or healthcare)

- Strong English communication skills with a calm, helpful

tone

- Fast, accurate data entry and excellent attention to detail

- Proven ability to juggle many moving parts and stay organized under time

pressure

- Problem solver who can think ahead and act quickly when plans change

- Basic understanding of HIPAA/privacy and client confidentiality

- Comfortable working US business hours; willing to work occasional

evenings/weekends/holidays as needed



Nice-to-Have (Tools & Systems)

Experience with any of these is a plus:



- Scheduling/EVV platforms: WellSky (ClearCare), AxisCare, AlayaCare

- Phone/SMS tools: RingCentral, Dialpad, JustCall, Twilio

- Productivity: Google Workspace or Microsoft 365, Slack/Teams, spreadsheets



Work Setup



- Laptop or desktop

- Reliable internet (at least 25 Mbps), backup connectivity/power recommended

- Quiet workspace and professional phone etiquette



Why You’ll Love Working with Us



- Competitive Base Pay: $6.50/hr for the first 6 months. (Among the highest in the homecare industry)

- Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best

care possible.

- Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for

advancement and learning.

- Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration,

compassion, and a good laugh.



Ready to Be a Hero?



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated,

have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more

compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s

make a difference together.



IMPORTANT: Directly apply and send your resume on our website: https://apply.workable.com/helperheroes/

title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper

Location: Remote

Job Type: Part-time

Starting Rate: $6.00/hour (Increase after 90-day performance review)



We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to join our growing team. If you have real experience with US tax preparation and QuickBooks bookkeeping and enjoy working in an organized, systems-driven environment, we encourage you to apply.



Overview

We are looking for a dedicated US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper to support our accounting and tax operations. In this role, you will prepare individual and business tax returns, maintain accurate financial records, and help ensure clients’ books are clean and tax-ready year-round.

This position is ideal for someone who is accurate, dependable, and proactive, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.



Job Details

As a US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper, you will manage tax preparation and bookkeeping tasks for multiple clients, maintain organized documentation, and support efficient workflows. Your work will play a key role in ensuring compliance, accuracy, and a smooth tax process for our clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

Tax Preparation & Compliance

Prepare Individual Tax Returns (Form 1040) and related schedules

Prepare Business Tax Returns (1120, 1120S, 1065)

Handle State and Franchise Tax filings

Review financial records to ensure accuracy and tax readiness

Identify missing information and communicate with the team as needed

Maintain organized digital tax workpapers and documentation



Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Perform bookkeeping using QuickBooks Online

Categorize transactions accurately

Reconcile bank and credit card accounts

Clean up and correct incomplete or messy books when necessary

Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet)

Ensure books remain accurate and ready for tax filing



Data Entry & Administrative Support

Perform accurate data entry and document management

Upload and organize client files using consistent naming and folder structures

Track tasks and meet internal deadlines

Assist with administrative support related to tax and accounting operations



Systems & Process Improvement

Follow and help improve internal workflows and checklists

Create SOPs and process documentation when needed

Identify opportunities to improve efficiency or reduce errors



What You Bring to the Role

Proven experience preparing US individual and business tax returns

Experience with QuickBooks Online

Experience with TaxSlayer or similar US tax software

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Excellent time management and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

Experience handling Franchise Taxes

Previous experience working with a US accounting or tax firm



What You Can Expect

Starting rate of $6.00/hour

Performance review after 90 days with opportunity for a pay increase

Long-term position with growth potential

Stable workload and supportive team environment

Opportunity to expand responsibilities based on performance



About the Company

We are a growing accounting and tax services company focused on providing accurate, reliable, and efficient support to our clients. Our goal is to build a strong remote team that values integrity, accountability, and continuous improvement. We believe in long-term relationships and creating opportunities for team members to grow with the company.

If you have real US tax preparation experience and are looking for a long-term remote opportunity, we encourage you to apply.

title: Customer Success Executive - Remote
description:
The Role

You'll be the first line of support for our customers via live chat. That means onboarding new users, troubleshooting issues in real time, and helping customers get value from features like our Engage Inbox, content calendar, reporting dashboards, and approval workflows. You won't be reading from scripts. You'll be solving real problems for real users.



What You'll Do

Handle inbound customer queries over chat (Intercom or similar), covering onboarding, feature walkthroughs, troubleshooting, and account-level questions. Proactively identify opportunities for customers to get more out of the platform. Flag product bugs and feature requests to the product team with clear reproduction steps. Collaborate with sales on expansion opportunities when you spot them. 



Who We're Looking For

Someone with 1-3 years of experience in a customer-facing role at a SaaS company. You write clearly and quickly in English, because chat support lives and dies on written communication. You have a working understanding of social media marketing (scheduling, analytics, engagement workflows, paid/organic reporting). You're comfortable navigating a technical product and explaining it simply. Bonus if you've worked with tools like Intercom, Freshdesk, or Zendesk and have heard of Hootsuite, Buffer or Sprout Social. 



What Won't Work

Slow, templated responses. Inability to context-switch between multiple conversations. No curiosity about the product or the industry. If you need a manager to tell you what to do for every edge case, this isn't the right fit.

title: Accounting and Finance Manager
description:
The Accounting and Finance Manager provides overall leadership in managing the company’s accounting operations, financial reporting, budgeting, cost control, and statutory compliance. The position ensures the accuracy and integrity of financial data and supports management in decision-making through timely and reliable financial information. The role also supervises the accounting team, establishes internal controls, and coordinates with internal and external auditors to maintain financial transparency and compliance.



 DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

  Financial Management and Reporting

?Oversee the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements in accordance with accounting standards.

?Review and analyze financial performance, identifying variances and recommending corrective actions.

?Ensure accurate recording of all financial transactions in compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements.

?. Develop and implement internal accounting policies, procedures, and controls to safeguard company assets.

?Lead the month-end and year-end closing activities to ensure timely reporting.

  Budgeting and Forecasting

?Direct the preparation of the annual budget and rolling forecasts in coordination with department heads.

?Monitor budget utilization, analyze variances, and report deviations to management.

?Provide financial analysis and projections to support management’s strategic and operational planning.

?Recommend cost-control initiatives and resource optimization measures.

  Treasury and Cash Flow Management

?Monitor cash flow, fund availability, and bank balances to ensure adequate liquidity.

?Oversee disbursements, collections, and fund transfers in accordance with company policies.

?Manage relationships with financial institutions to secure favorable terms for credit facilities, investments, and other financial services.

?Evaluate and recommend options for investment and capital utilization.

  Tax and Regulatory Compliance

?Ensure compliance with BIR, SEC, and other regulatory reporting requirements.

?. Review and approve statutory filings, including VAT, income tax, withholding tax, and other mandatory returns.

?Coordinate with external auditors, tax consultants, and government agencies for audits, assessments, or queries.

?Keep management informed of changes in tax and financial regulations that may affect company operations.

  Leadership and People Management

?Supervise, mentor, and evaluate the accounting and finance staff to ensure high performance.

?Provide training and guidance to strengthen technical and analytical skills within the team.

?Foster a culture of accountability, integrity, and continuous improvement within the finance group.

?Support succession planning and career development initiatives for key roles in the department.

You will be the face of our store on Whatnot. We provide the products, the US-based account, and the training. Your job is to bring the energy, showcase the items, and drive sales through live auctions!



???? Key Responsibilities

Live Hosting: Conduct engaging live auctions on the Whatnot app targeting the US audience.



Product Mastery: Receive and study product samples sent to your location before going live.



Technical Setup: Log into our US-based Whatnot account using a provided US Proxy/VPN setup to ensure platform compliance.



Community Building: Interact with bidders, answer questions in real-time, and manage "Giveaways" to boost room engagement.



Platform Learning: Complete our internal training to master Whatnot’s unique auction mechanics and selling tools.



? Requirements

Fluent English: Excellent verbal communication skills with a confident, high-energy personality (US accent or neutral accent preferred).



Tech Savvy: Ability to follow technical instructions for setting up a stable US IP/Proxy environment.



Niche Interest: Passion for [Insert Category: e.g., Funko Pops, Trading Cards, Vintage Clothing, or Jewelry].



Reliable Internet: High-speed Fiber connection (at least 20Mbps upload/download) is a must.



Shift Flexibility: Must be willing to work during US Peak Hours (Graveyard shift in the Philippines).



Equipment: A high-quality smartphone (iPhone 12 or newer / high-end Android) and a professional lighting setup (Ring light).



???? Compensation & Perks

Hourly Pay: Competitive rate of $[Insert Amount] per hour, paid weekly/bi-weekly.



Performance Bonuses: Earn extra commissions based on sales targets and viewer retention.



Samples Provided: We ship the inventory directly to your doorstep.



Paid Training: Get paid while you learn the ins and outs of the Whatnot platform.

title: Finance & Accounting Associate
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Job Summary:

We are currently seeking a Finance and Accounting Associate to join our finance team. If you are an experienced professional with a knack for numbers and a keen eye for detail, we would love to hear from you.



 Work Schedule:  US Hours (EST)

 Work Setup:  Remote | Independent Contractor

 Employment Type:  Full-Time | Long-Term Opportunity

 Salary Range:  $1,200 -1,500/ Month (USD)

 Perks:  Unlimited PTO days + HMO (after probation)

 Payout:  Semi-Monthly

 Equipment:  Self-Provided



Key Responsibilities:



• Reconcile claims reimbursements from clients efficiently and accurately.

• Assist with various financial tasks as needed.

• Review and analyze each business transaction, particularly at high volume, ensuring accuracy and compliance.

• Utilize QuickBooks Online to manage and record financial transactions.

• Employ Excel and Google Sheets for data analysis and reporting.

• Use Rippling for payroll and benefits administration.

• Communicate effectively both in writing and verbally with business partners, clients, and tea
mbers.

• Confidently make phone calls to validate disputes and resolve issues with business partners or clients.



Requirements:

• Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar finance role.

• Proficiency in QuickBooks Online is required.

• Strong skills in Excel and Google Sheets.

• Experience with Rippling is a significant advantage.

• High attention to detail and accuracy in handling financial transactions.

• Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

• Ability to handle high volumes of transactions and maintain accuracy.

• Confidence and professionalism in making phone calls to resolve disputes.

• Strong organizational skills and the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

title: NEMT OPERATIONS ASSOCIATE
description:
HIRING FILIPINO AND PHILIPPINE-BASED ONLY!



Company Overview:

Wingz is a leading rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT).

Visit our website: 



Position: NEMT Operations Associate

Work Schedule: US Hours (EST)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)  

Employment Type: Full-Time / Long Term

Salary Rate: USD 700 - 1,000/ Month

Benefit: 10 PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-monthly

Equipment: Self-Provide



Job Summary:



As Wingz continues to grow in the NEMT field, we are expanding our team to keep up with demand. Accepted candidates may start in a Support Team capacity and can be moved into one of the following specialized roles based on their skills, performance, and our operational needs:



Market Associate

• Build and manage relationships with healthcare facilities, brokers, and partners

• Drive outreach, pipeline activity, and market growth in assigned US territories

• Best fit: business development, sales, client relations, partnership management



Driver Safety & Reliability

• Monitor driver performance and safety scores

• Investigate i
 and implement corrective action protocols

• Best fit: fleet operations, logistics, QA, safety management, transport compliance



Driver Onboarding

• Manage end-to-end driver onboarding — documentation, background checks, training, system enrollment

• Ensure every driver is deployment-ready before their first trip

• Best fit: HR operations, people operations, workforce admin, talent coordination



Compliance

• Ensure operations align with NEMT federal and state regulations

• Maintain audit-ready records and resolve compliance gaps

• Best fit: regulatory compliance, healthcare admin, risk management, policy implementation



What We Look For in Every Candidate

• Structured thinker — analyzes situations clearly before acting

• Strong executor — follows through with urgency and precision

• Resolution-driven — owns problems end-to-end until resolved

• Standards-oriented — implements protocols consistently without being prompted

• Accountable — self-managed, reliable, and holds a high personal standard



Requirements:



• Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in any of the tracks above

• Strong written and verbal English — professional and confident

• Comfortable working independently in a remote, US-facing environment

• Proficient with data, trackers, dashboards, and operations tools

• Experience with US-based clients or companies is a strong advantage

• Leadership or team coordination experience is a significant advantage — considered for senior or lead-level placement

title: Facebook Media Buyer
description:
**WARNING: YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED IF YOU DON'T SUBMIT IN THE JOTFORM BELOW


/
Media Buyer 
) — Full-Time (40 hrs/week)



Company: AT Media Partners

Location: Remote

Core Hours: 9:00am–5:00pm AEST (Monday–Friday)

Compensation: $700–$1,000 USD/month base + performance bonuses (up to $400/month)

Reporting To: Aaron Tang (Founder & CEO)





About the Role



As a Media Buyer, you will be responsible for launching, managing, and optimising paid advertising campaigns for our clients across
 Ads and Google Ads. Your mission is simple: drive consistent lead volume while hitting strong CPL targets.



This is local lead generation, not complex eCommerce. You’ll be running straightforward campaigns (radius targeting, lead forms, direct response) at scale — typically 40+ active campaigns — so efficiency and organisation matter.





Key Responsibilities



Campaign Setup & Launch

 • Build and launch new campaigns for newly 
 clients across
 & Google Ads

 • Configure targeting, budgets, creatives, lead forms, tracking, and campaign structure



Daily Campaign Management

 • Monitor performance daily and make smart optimisations

 • Adjust budgets, pause underperformers, and scale winning ads

 • Maintain clean account structure and ensure campaigns run smoothly



Cost Per Lead (CPL) Optimisation

 • Continuously optimise to reduce CPL and increase lead volume

 • Identify inefficiencies and implement performance improvements quickly



A/B Testing

 • Test ad creatives, copy, audiences, placements, and campaign angles

 • Use testing insights to improve results and prevent creative fatigue



Reporting

 • Track and report key metrics such as CPL, CTR, CPC, frequency, conversion volume

 • Provide clear updates to the internal team and support client reporting needs



Troubleshooting & Problem Solving

 • Diagnose and fix underperformance (low CTR, high CPL, learning limitations)

 • Resolve ad rejections, policy issues, and technical hiccups efficiently



Collaboration

 • Work closely with the Ad Creative Team (images/videos) and CSMs (client requests + feedback)

 • Collaborate with other media buyers to share insights and improve systems





What Success Looks Like (KPIs)



We measure success by results, not hours. Here’s what “winning” looks like:

 • Average CPL: $11–$17

 • Campaign Load: 40+ campaigns managed

 • Ad Approval Rate: ? 95%

 • Internal Response Time: < 2>

 • Client Retention Support: Contribute to ? 11% churn by delivering consistent performance



If you consistently hit these targets, you can earn $900–$1,400+ per month (base + bonuses).



Who You’ll Work With



You’ll report directly to Aaron Tang (Founder & CEO) and collaborate with:

 • Customer Success Managers (CSMs): handle client communication and relay requests/feedback

 • Ad Creative Team: produces ad images and videos for your campaigns

 • Other Media Buyers: collaborate on performance improvements and best practices



Our Clients



Our clients are:

 • Blue-collar service businesses (plumbers, electricians, HVAC, roofing, etc.)

 • Based in Australia and the USA

 • Spending $2,000–$5,000/month on ads

 • Expecting consistent lead flow (typically 20–50 leads/month)



What Makes This Role Different

 • This is not an eCommerce role — no ROAS obsession, complex funnels, or multi-step conversion paths

 • Local lead gen is straightforward, but you’ll manage it at scale

 • You’ll have full autonomy over campaign management (no micromanagement)

 • You can earn up to $400/month in bonuses for crushing CPL targets



Compensation



Base Salary (Full-Time)

 • $700–$1,000 USD/month (based on experience)

 • 40 hours/week



Performance Bonuses (Monthly)



To qualify for bonuses, you must manage 40+ campaigns.



Average CPL Monthly Bonus

$14–$17 $100

$11–$13 $200

$9–$12 $300

Sub-$8 $400



Example Monthly Earnings

 • New hire (Month 1–2): $700 (ramp-up)

 • Good performance: $900

 • Great performance: $1,100

 • Exceptional performance: $1,300

 • Elite performance: $1,400



Top performers consistently earn $1,200–$1,400/month.



Payment Terms

 • Paid monthly in arrears (within 7 business days of invoice)

 • Paid via Wise (Wise Business account required)

 • You’ll invoice monthly with a breakdown of base + bonuses



Required Skills & Experience

 • 1–2+ years running
 Ads and/or Google Ads (local lead gen preferred)

 • Proven ability to hit strong CPLs (ideally $10–$20 CPL for service businesses)

 • Strong understanding of core KPIs: CPL, CTR, CPC, frequency, conversion rate

 • Experience in
 Ads Manager (setup, targeting, budgets, optimisation)

 • Experience with Google Ads (Search required; LSA/Display a plus)

 • Tech-savvy and fast learner (Slack, 
, GoHighLevel, Sheets)

 • Detail-oriented and highly organised (40+ campaigns without errors)

 • Coachable and able to implement feedback quickly



Preferred (Not Required)

 • Experience running ads for trades/service businesses (plumbing, electrical, HVAC, roofing)

 • Experience with lead form ads 
 + Google)

 • Familiarity with GoHighLevel

 • Experience using AI-generated creatives

 • Comfortable managing 40+ campaigns simultaneously



Personality Traits We Value

 • Detail-oriented

 • Results-driven

 • Proactive and independent problem solver

 • Highly organised

 • Coachable

 • Tech-savvy

 • Efficient and fast-moving



Tools & Platforms You’ll Use

 •
 Ads Manager

 • Google Ads

 • GoHighLevel (CRM)

 • 

 • Slack

 • Google Sheets

 • Canva

 • Loom

title: Technical Ops Specialist (Automations + App Support)
description:
Hey — welcome!



Are you the kind of person who sees a broken automation and immediately wants to fix it, not just flag it? Do you get a quiet thrill from clean workflows, solid schemas, and systems that just... work? Then keep reading — because this might be the role you've been waiting for.



Funnel Futurist is a fast-moving, internationally recognized team helping ambitious entrepreneurs build and scale through world-class funnels, content, and tech infrastructure. We're growing fast — and we need someone who can keep the engine running while we pour fuel on it.



We're looking for a Technical Ops Specialist —  a technically sharp operator who can get their hands dirty with automations, app infrastructure, and real daily problem-solving. If you've ever built a 
 scenario from scratch, troubleshot a GHL workflow at 9pm, or helped someone wrangle a Replit project into shape — we want to hear from you.



What You'll Actually Be Doing

Your job is to make sure things don't break — and when they do, to fix them fast without it landing on the wrong desk.



Automation Management

Build, monitor, and fix automations in 
, GoHighLevel (GHL), and other tools

Proactively spot breakages before they become client problems

Document automations clearly so the team isn't dependent on any one person



App & Dev Support

Support ongoing client app development projects in Replit

Assist with schema work, data structures, and lightweight backend tasks

Contribute to an app consolidation project — helping bring disparate tools under one roof



AI-Powered Ops

Use Claude Code and other AI tools to speed up your work and solve novel problems

Help identify where AI can be applied to reduce manual overhead across the business



General Technical Support

Be the first line of defense when something technical breaks 

Communicate clearly with the team about what broke, why, and what you did to fix it

Create and maintain SOPs for every process you touch



Who You Are

You're a problem-solver first 

You have hands-on experience with at least two of the following: 
, GoHighLevel, Replit, AI tools (Claude/ChatGPT), Google Sheets/Apps Script, or database/schema work

You communicate like a pro — clear, concise, and proactive with updates

You don't wait to be told twice. When something's broken, you're already on it.

You're comfortable working independently but know when to escalate

You've got a growth mindset and want to keep leveling up your technical skills



Role Requirements

Proficiency with 
 (scenario building, error handling, debugging) or other similar tools

Working knowledge of GoHighLevel (workflows, pipelines, automations) and other CRMs

Experience with AI tools — Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent (daily use, not just dabbling)

Familiarity with Replit or similar lightweight dev environments

Strong async communication skills (Slack-based team)

Ability to write clear, usable SOPs and process documentation

EST-aligned working hours



Perks

???? Fully Remote — work from wherever you do your best thinking

? Performance bonuses — excellence gets rewarded here

???? Real growth opportunity — this role has a long runway for the right person

????? Access to world-class tools, training, and processes

???? Tight-knit team that actually values your contribution



About Our Founders

John & Phoenix have generated millions in direct and indirect revenue through their expertise in copywriting, funnel building, and coaching. They've scaled businesses with proven systems — and now they need a technical right hand to protect and expand that infrastructure. When things work, they can focus on growth. That's where you come in.



Our Values

Speed is king — High-priority tasks get handled now, not "later today"

Over-deliver — Good enough isn't good enough. We aim for excellent.

1?tter every day — We're a team of people who love getting sharper in their craft



How to Apply

We move fast and review applications as they come in. To apply:

Change your subject line to: "Automations Ready — [Insert your country's capital city]"

Answer this question: Describe a time you fixed something technical that was broken and no one else could figure it out. What was it, what did you do, and what was the result?

Attach: Your resume + any relevant work samples (
 scenarios, GHL setups, Replit projects, SOP docs — anything that shows your work)



Note: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a brief paid trial. We believe in seeing real work in action — and we'll be fair and transparent about every step.

title: Lawyer
description:
In-House Counsel



I am a Canadian surgeon seeking a full-time lawyer to join my medicolegal team as in-house counsel.



Qualifications

-Strong background in medical negligence, administrative law, tribunals, appeals, and judicial review.

-Solid civil litigation experience, with the ability to manage all phases of litigation—from discovery through trial.

-Familiarity with Canadian law (or other common law systems) is a significant asset.



Responsibilities

-Drafting and reviewing legal documents.

-Coordinating with local counsel to control costs and improve turnaround times.

-Maintaining organized, cloud-based legal files.

-Providing clear, well-reasoned written and oral communication in English.



Skills & Attributes

-Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy.

-Highly focused, motivated, and proactive.

-Strong organizational and time management skills.

-Ability to handle multiple projects at once.



Work Structure

-This is ideally a full-time position — our team values commitment and focus.

-Current legal team: one full-time lawyer, two paralegals;  several collaborating outside counsel

-Hiring process typically begins with a 2 week paid assignment, followed by a 3-month paid onboarding period for successful candidates.



Workday starts at 8:00 a.m. your local time (6:00 p.m. GMT-6). Most communication will be by
, with occasional coordination calls scheduled at 8:00 a.m. your time.



Compensation

Salary is commensurate with experience and productivity.



How to Apply

If you are interested in this role, please send the following to 

1. Your CV

2. A writing sample (preferably a substantive pleading rather than something procedural)

title: Paralegal
description:
Our team of 3 lawyers and a surgeon deals with medicolegal civil and administrative litigation files 



Key Responsibilities

-Transcription of dictations and legal files using transcription software; correcting grammar, punctuation, and formatting

- Editing and combining documents in Microsoft Word, Google Docs, and Adobe PDF

- Organizing and summarizing
s, medical charts, and Google Drive folders

- Assisting with document proofreading and completion

-Coordinating task assignments and ensuring proper communication between staff

-Other Misc Admin Tasks.



Required Skills



- Excellent organization and time management 

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear written and oral communication

- Proficiency with Microsoft Word, Google Docs/Sheets, and Adobe PDF

- Ability to edit, format, and combine documents accurately



- some medical background is helpful but not required.

- Legal education or experience is helpful but not required.



Hours of Work



Full time (Monday–Friday, 8 hours/day)



Compensation

Competitive rate, commensurate with skills and experience



We take honesty and accuracy of experience very seriously.



Applicants claiming advanced experience or skills will be expected to demonstrate them through a short skills verification exercise during the hiring process.



If your application or CV contains false or exaggerated information, it will be immediately disqualified. Genuine applicants who are transparent about their abilities will always be given fair consideration.



How to Apply



Please send your CV to 
 with the subject line:

“Virtual Assistant Application – [Your Full Name]”



1. Video Resume – 1–2 minutes introducing yourself and your experience

2. Resume / CV

3. Please answer briefly and honestly (1–3 sentences each):

3.1. When you start your work shift, what are the first three things you normally do — in order?

3.2 If you realize a file you sent to an opposing party has the wrong attachment and the recipient already opened it, what exactly would you do next?

3.3. What kind of task or responsibility usually stresses you out, and how do you handle it?



Note:

Failure to follow the application instructions below means your application will not be reviewed or accommodated.

We are testing attention to detail from the first step.

title: Support Specialist
description:
IMPORTANT NOTE: EXPERIENCE SUPPORTING EDUCATIONAL TECHNOLOGY PLATFORMS IS HIGHLY PREFERRED.



STEPS TO APPLY:

• PUT “TIME” IN THE SUBJECT LINE

• WRITE A SHORT COVER LETTER INTRODUCING YOURSELF

• SHARE A LINK TO YOUR UPDATED CV OR RESUME



WE WILL ONLY REVIEW APPLICATIONS THAT INCLUDE A LINK TO A CV OR RESUME.





About the Role

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Support Specialist who will serve as the first point of contact for customers needing assistance with navigating the app, troubleshooting issues, or understanding how the system works.



Your responsibilities will include handling day-to-day inquiries, coordinating with implementation managers during onboarding, and helping improve the overall user experience by identifying recurring issues and feedback trends.



As the platform continues to grow, your insights will help improve our support processes and contribute to ongoing product enhancements.

 

What You’ll Do

-Work closely with our implementation team during onboarding and setup

-Test new features or product updates and flag potential issues before they impact customers

-Help maintain and improve support resources such as help articles, guides, and internal documentation

-Respond to support tickets and assist users with platform navigation, feature inquiries, login/access issues, and basic troubleshooting

-Escalate more complex technical issues to the appropriate internal team when needed

-Track and categorize incoming requests to help identify patterns, recurring issues, and improvement opportunities



What We’re Looking For

-Excellent English communication skills: written, spoken, and verbal (MUST) 

-Proven experience in customer support, technical support, or a similar role (MUST)

-Experience providing customer or technical support to schools, educational institutions, or EdTech platforms (ADVANTAGE)

-Experience using help desk or ticketing systems (ADVANTAGE)

-Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to finding answers and documenting solutions

-Highly organized and comfortable handling multiple tickets, updates, and tasks without missing details

-Analytical mindset with the ability to identify patterns and trends in support requests

-Team-oriented with the ability to collaborate effectively with product, operations, and support teams

-Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growing company environment

-Passion for education and a genuine interest in helping schools operate more effectively

 

Work Setup

-This is a full-time job in a permanent work-from-home setup

-You will work 8 hours a day, 5 days a week

title: Head of Marketplaces (Ecommerce - Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



This role is ideal for someone with strong commercial instincts, leadership experience, and hands-on marketplace expertise. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing marketplace operations, and leading strategy across multiple platforms.



Key Responsibilities:



- Defining vision, setting priorities, and driving growth across online marketplaces.

- Own overall marketplace strategy and performance (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and future platforms)

- Drive sales growth, profitability, and market share.

- Plan and execute campaigns, promotions, and product launches.

- Optimize product listings, pricing, and assortment.

- Analyze sales data, traffic, and conversion metrics to improve performance.

- Manage marketplace operations including inventory coordination, order fulfillment, logistics, returns, and customer service.

- Monitor competitors and marketplace trends.

- Ensure compliance with marketplace policies and standards.

- Collaborate with the Marketing team to optimize demand, funnels, and conversions while scaling livestream, affiliate, and KOL/KOC commerce.

- Oversee forecasting, performance tracking, and executive-level reporting.

- Communication with Key Account Managers.

- Leading PH team, collaborating with other multicultural teams, and managing external partners.



Qualifications:

- 3 - 5 years proven experience in E-commerce Marketplace Management (e.g., Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop) or roles as E-commerce Manager or Marketplace Manager.

- Background in fast-growing or high-volume e-commerce businesses.

- Strong understanding of online sales, promotions, and analytics.

- Knowledge of paid ads within marketplaces (Shopee Ads, Lazada Ads, TikTok Ads).

- Proficient in Google Workspace (especially Google sheets) and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Experience managing multiple SKUs and campaigns.

- Excellent communication and leadership skills.

- Data-driven mindset with strong problem-solving abilities.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.







We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you.

title: Creative Director
description:
Full-Time | 42 hours for 6 days a week | $1500 up to $2000



We’re looking for someone who is chronically online in the best way possible.



The type of person who:



• Saves TikToks and Reels constantly

• Knows when a video is about to go viral

• Understands trends before they become trends

• Thinks about content ideas while scrolling



If social media feels less like work and more like second nature, keep reading.



This role is for someone who wants to turn their love for content into a real career.



You’ll be helping create high-performing short-form videos and visuals designed to reach millions of viewers across social media platforms.



This isn’t just an editing job. You’ll also help shape the creative direction of content — spotting trends, improving ideas, and helping posts perform better.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- You’ll work with our social media team to create engaging short-form content for platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Your responsibilities will include editing videos, working with images, improving visuals, and helping guide the creative direction of posts so they perform better online.

- You’ll also help identify trends, analyze content performance, and contribute ideas that help our social media pages grow.



This Role Is Perfect For Someone Who:



• Is always on social media and understands internet culture

• Loves creating or editing short-form videos

• Naturally notices what makes content go viral

• Has strong English communication skills

• Has a good eye for visuals, aesthetics, and storytelling

• Is reliable, hardworking, and takes responsibility for their work

• Wants to grow their skills in social media and content creation



Experience editing short-form videos is important. Experience in creative direction is a bonus, but not required.



What matters most is that you’re creative, curious, and eager to learn.



Why This Is a Great Opportunity:



• Fully remote work

• Paid training

• Long-term position with growth opportunities

• No micromanagement

• Work on content seen by large audiences

• Opportunities for promotion and salary increases based on performance



To apply, please send:

1. A 1-minute video introduction telling us about yourself and why you'd be a good fit

2. A link to your creative portfolio 



NOTE: Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed!



We’re looking for people who bring creativity, personality, and strong work ethic — not generic applications.



If you’re passionate about social media and want to turn that passion into a career, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Full-time Social Media Manager
description:
Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term

42 hours/week | 6 days/week

$1,000 – $1,400 USD/month (based on experience)



Who This Role Is For:



This role is for someone who genuinely loves social media and understands how Instagram works today (trends, formats, timing, and why certain posts go viral)



You don’t need years of professional experience!

What we care about most is your passion for content creation and your understanding of what makes content trend and perform well.



If you’re the type who notices patterns on your feed, saves posts for “content inspo,” or can explain why a Reel popped off then this role will be a great fit.



Your responsibilities include:

- Posting content daily across multiple Instagram accounts

- Writing captions and stories that feel natural and engaging

- Monitoring post performance (reach, saves, shares, engagement)

- Making smart posting decisions based on data and patterns

- Spotting trending formats and adapting them quickly

- Reviewing content carefully before posting to avoid mistakes

- Sharing insights with the content team on what’s working and what’s not



You’ll be trained on how to analyze metrics, understand posting patterns, and improve performance over time.



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong interest in social media and content creation

- Good understanding of social media trends and viral content

- Attention to detail and strong judgment

- Comfortable working independently in a remote setup

- Willingness to learn and improve

- Experience is a plus BUT NOT REQUIRED

- Personal pages, passion projects, or content you’ve made for fun all count as experience.



Why You’ll Like This Role:

- Fully remote work

- No micromanagement

- Paid training and regular feedback

- Opportunity to work on accounts with large audiences

- Clear growth path into strategist or leadership roles

- Supportive and healthy team culture



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To be considered, your application must include:

1. A portfolio (this can be client work, personal Instagram pages, Reels, TikToks, or any creative projects.)

2. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes): Tell us why you’re a great fit. Be creative &  show your personality. We are not looking for a boring or scripted intro.

3. The number “100” in your application subject line (this helps us know you read the full post)



IMPORTANT!!!!!!!

*No video introduction = no review

*Boring or low-effort video = automatic pass



We’re looking for someone creative, detail-oriented, and passionate about social media not just someone who can follow instructions.



If this sounds like you, apply. We’re excited to see what you bring!

title: Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager (D2C E-commerce Coffee Brand) *Full Time | Remote (Asia Time Zone)
description:
Innovative global coffee brand inventing one-of-a-kind tools redefining how coffee is experienced. Seeking a Marketing Operator to own campaigns, launches, and cross-channel execution alongside founders.





ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

ICOSA Brewhouse is a globally recognized specialty coffee brand redefining how coffee is experienced. We are shaping coffee culture around the world. (
  / 
 )



We design and invent one-of-a-kind tools that didn’t exist before — tools that elevate everyday rituals and introduce new ways of enjoying coffee.



From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, in top cafés, and in homes in 100+ countries around the world. 



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.



As we continue to innovate, launch new products, and grow, we are looking for a Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager to take ownership of how our work is brought to life across channels.



You won’t just publish content.



You’ll help shape how new products are introduced, how campaigns are structured, and how our global community experiences our brand — while ensuring execution remains disciplined, consistent, and scalable.







YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

This is a senior marketing operator role. Execution is central — but it is not a junior content posting role.



You will work directly with our Marketing Lead to:

• Own day-to-day marketing delivery across core channels

• Structure and execute campaigns from planning through rollout

• Translate ideas into clear, executable briefs

• Coordinate creative production across internal, outsourced, and AI-assisted workflows

• Strengthen how our marketing engine operates over time



You will see early product prototypes.

You will contribute to campaign discussions before launch.

You will help shape how innovation is presented to a global audience.



Execution is central to this role — but so is judgment, ownership, and the ability to think in campaigns rather than isolated posts.





What you’ll own:



(1) Marketing Execution Across Channels

• Own social media execution (Instagram and
).

• Plan and manage content calendars aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure consistent publishing and follow-through across platforms.

• Manage inbox and community engagement, including partnership or influencer communication if required.

• Execute
 campaigns aligned with launches, promotions, and collaborations.



You ensure marketing execution remains structured, timely, and dependable.



(2) Campaign Rollout & Launch Execution

• Support and execute seasonal campaigns, product launches, collaborations, and promotional initiatives.

• Translate marketing objectives into structured creative briefs.

• Coordinate creative asset development across designers, freelancers, and AI-supported workflows.

• Oversee cohesive cross-channel rollout so messaging, visuals, and timing align across social,
, and paid efforts.

• Strengthen campaign structure and rollout processes over time.



You think in campaigns — not just content pieces.



(3) Creative Briefing & Quality Control

• Create clear, structured briefs for design and content production.

• Maintain high standards of aesthetic consistency, messaging clarity, and brand voice integrity across both human and AI-assisted workflows.

• Draft copy or guide AI-assisted content creation when needed, ensuring outputs remain on-brand and high quality.

• Review creative outputs for brand alignment before escalation to the Marketing Lead.

• Collaborate comfortably in tools such as Figma or similar platforms to support execution and alignment.



You don’t need to be a designer — but you should have strong creative judgment.



(4) Growth & Operational Development

• Identify opportunities to refine workflows and strengthen how our marketing engine operates.

• Lead or contribute to structured testing and rollout of new channels or initiatives as capacity allows.

• Over time, take increasing ownership of campaign structuring, cross-channel coordination, partnership campaign oversight, and creative alignment across performance-driven efforts.



As you demonstrate reliability and judgment, your scope expands meaningfully.





What success looks like:

• Social and
 channels operate smoothly with consistent execution and strong brand alignment.

• Campaigns are rolled out in a coordinated, cross-channel manner without last-minute chaos.

• Creative briefs are structured, clear, and reduce friction across collaborators.

• Marketing execution no longer bottlenecks leadership attention.

• Early experiments in new channels or initiatives are tested in a structured way.



Over time, you become a trusted execution leader within the marketing team.





What This Role Is Not:

• Not a pure content creator role.

• Not a brand strategist role.

• Not a paid media buyer role.

• Not an administrative coordinator role.



This is a senior marketing operator position inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

• Understands how structured marketing campaigns come together.

• Can translate ideas into clear execution plans.

• Is comfortable owning delivery without hand-holding.

• Is comfortable reviewing performance data and using insights to inform execution decisions.

• Is strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



You are strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



Must have skills or experience:

• 4–6+ years of experience managing marketing and/or social for a brand.

• Experience executing structured marketing campaigns.

• Experience within D2C or product-based brands strongly preferred.

• Comfortable operating inside e-commerce environments.

• Highly detail-oriented and disciplined in follow-through.

• Strong creative judgment and ability to assess content quality and brand alignment.

• Comfort collaborating in design tools such as Figma.

• Comfortable working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team.



Big pluses:

• Experience supporting product launches or crowdfunding campaigns.

• Experience creating, implementing, and refining marketing processes or building SOPs.

• Experience coordinating freelancers or creative collaborators.

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or similar
 platforms.

• Exposure to AI-assisted marketing workflows.







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Work directly with founders who are deeply involved in product design, positioning, and global campaigns.

• Operate close to innovation — seeing products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

• Contribute to campaigns that reach a global coffee audience.

• Have real ownership inside a small, high-performing team where your work is visible and impactful.

• Help shape coffee culture around the world.



We are a fully remote team — but we operate with structure and discipline.



You’ll be joining a close-knit group focused on building something meaningful with collaboration and accountability. There is no office politics. No unnecessary hierarchy. Just people committed to high standards.



We care deeply about growth — not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership, lead initiatives, and shape how our marketing evolves.



If you want a role where:

• Your ideas are heard.

• Your execution matters.

• Your scope can grow with your capability.

You will feel at home here.







COMPENSATION AND WORKING STRUCTURE

Full time: 40 hours/week 

Compensation range: $1,100-$1,800 (based on relevant experience and demonstrated capability)

Up to 16 days of paid time off annually

Asia time zone working hours required







HOW TO APPLY

Are you ready? 



If you’d like to join us on our journey and grow together with us, we’re looking forward to meeting you.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our application process extremely efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Complete the quick application: 
 

2. In the first question of the application start it with: "I’m (insert your name) from (insert your city/town) and my favourite food is (insert your favourite food). Then introduce yourself and why you think you’ll be a good fit for this position. 

3. We’ll be in touch with next steps for the interview once we receive it. 



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Content Writer
description:
Content Writer -- Australian Safety & Compliance (Part-Time, Remote)



We run a safety and compliance blog for an Australian manufacturing business. The content covers Australian standards, workplace safety regulations, and compliance topics relevant to emergency services and industrial sectors.

We are looking for a writer who can research properly and write in a clear, authoritative style. This is not general content work. You need to be comfortable reading technical documents, Australian Standards references, and government publications, then turning that into well-structured articles that a professional audience will actually read.



What you will be doing

Writing one to two articles per month. We provide the topic. You research, write, and reference it properly using academic or university-style referencing (APA or similar).



What we are looking for

Someone who has written technical or regulatory content before. You need to be able to read an Australian Standard or compliance document and understand it well enough to write about it accurately. Strong written English is essential. AI-generated content will not be accepted.



Rate: 550 PHP per hour



Hours: Varies, roughly 4 to 8 hours per article depending on complexity



Start: Immediately



To apply, send two writing samples. At least one should be technical, regulatory, or standards-based writing. No samples, no response.

description:
Job Title: SEO Specialist (Mid-Level)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote

About the Role

Vertex360 Group is an Australian NDIS-focused business portfolio operating various brands across provider

management software, compliance consulting, participant support, and plan management. We are looking for an

SEO Specialist with strong content writing skills to grow our organic presence across traditional search engines

and AI-driven platforms.

This role goes beyond standard SEO execution. You will own keyword strategy, produce high-quality content,

manage technical SEO, and build our visibility in AI-generated search results — including platforms like ChatGPT,

Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. You will work across multiple brands within the NDIS sector, so

understanding this space is a clear advantage.

What You Will Do

SEO & Content Strategy

• Develop and execute SEO strategies that produce measurable organic growth across the Vertex360 Group

brand portfolio.

• Create high-quality, NLP-friendly content aligned with target audience search intent and business goals.

• Build and maintain content frameworks, SOPs, and reusable execution templates.

• Optimise content for AI-generated search results through Answer Optimisation (AO) and Generative Engine

Optimisation (GEO) techniques.

• Map content to funnel stages, from awareness through to conversion.

Keyword Research & Search Intent

• Own keyword research and identify high-impact opportunities across all brands.

• Map search intent across traditional and AI-driven search journeys.

• Align keyword targeting with audience segments, including NDIS providers, participants, and plan managers.

Technical SEO

• Identify and resolve technical issues including indexation, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, and site performance.

• Conduct regular SEO audits using industry-standard tools.

• Collaborate with developers and the marketing team to implement technical fixes efficiently.

• Manage and optimise WordPress websites using Elementor or equivalent page builders.

Data, Reporting & Performance Tracking

• Track organic performance using GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, and other tools.

• Deliver clear, actionable reports on SEO performance and content effectiveness.

• Monitor performance across both traditional search and emerging AI search channels.

Backlink & Authority Building

• Build quality backlinks through competitor analysis, outreach, and community engagement (Quora, Reddit,

industry forums).

• Conduct domain authority and link quality analysis.

• Identify scalable, repeatable link acquisition opportunities.

Trends & Continuous Improvement

• Stay current with SEO, GEO, and AI search developments including LLM-based search and platform shifts

across Google, TikTok, and Instagram.

• Filter signal from noise — focus on high-impact changes, not every algorithm update.

Requirements

• 2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience with a proven record of driving organic growth.

• Strong content writing skills — you can produce clear, well-structured, optimised content independently.

• Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO.

• Experience with WordPress content management and optimisation.

• Hands-on experience with Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, GA4, and Google Search Console.

• Familiarity with GEO and AI-driven search platforms (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews).

• Strong analytical mindset — you translate data into clear next actions.

• Fluent in written and spoken English.

• Able to work independently and manage multiple projects in a remote setting.

Preferred Qualifications

• Knowledge of the Australian NDIS (National Disability Insurance Scheme) — including how NDIS providers,

support coordinators, plan managers, and participants search for services and software online.

• Experience in a multi-brand environment.

• Active participation in Reddit, Quora, or niche community platforms.

• Familiarity with Answer Optimisation (AO) and structured content for AI citation.

• Experience with Elementor or similar WordPress page builders.

• Understanding of local SEO, particularly within Australian markets.

A Note on NDIS Knowledge

The NDIS sector has its own language, compliance framework, and audience behaviour. Candidates who

already understand terms like Support Coordination, Plan Management, NDIS registration, and the NDIS

Quality and Safeguards Commission will move faster and create more relevant content from day one. This

knowledge is not mandatory — but it is a strong differentiator.

Vertex360 Group is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from diverse backgrounds

title: UGC / AI Ad Creative Specialist (Meta Ads – 5–15 sec)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced UGC / AI ad creator who specialises in high-converting 5–15 second creatives for Meta 
 & Instagram).

This role is focused purely on performance — creating scroll-stopping hooks, testing variations at scale, and producing content that drives results.

What you’ll be responsible for:

Creating 5–15 second UGC-style ads

Developing multiple hook variations (20–50 creatives weekly)

Using AI tools to generate and iterate creatives

Optimising based on performance data (CTR, ROAS, CPA, etc.)

?? MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE):

You must have proven, hands-on experience using the top AI UGC platforms:

Creatify (bulk ad generation + testing)

Arcads (high-converting, realistic UGC ads)

HeyGen (avatars + voice scaling)

???? You should understand these tools inside out, including:

Creating multiple ad variations quickly

Testing hooks at scale

Identifying and scaling winning creatives

???? You MUST be able to show:

Examples of 5–15 sec ads you’ve created

Proof of performance (ROAS, CTR, CPA, etc.)

Experience using the above platforms in real campaigns

???? Do NOT apply if:

You haven’t used these tools before

You only have basic or beginner experience

You can’t provide proof of results

title: Video Editor
description:
YouTube Video Editor needed for faceless YouTube channels. This is a long-term position with consistent work.



The Videos may range from a variety of different niches and you must be able to adapt to the niches editing styles and find your own clips and images. 



I’m looking for an editor with the following skills:



- Match Visuals to VO.

- know how to edit long form for YouTube 15-25 Minutes.

- Experienced in finding royalty-free and copyright-free footage.

- Able to find clips and accurate visual sources for the video. (not overused stock footage)



Responsibilities:



- Analyze scripts and understand the vision for each video.

- Find clips and images for the videos and combine them with our assets.

- Add visuals and minor effects.

- Make sure the videos follow YouTube guidelines.





Requirements:



- Experience editing long video content on YouTube, preferably for faceless channels.

- Strong ATTENTION TO DETAIL and know how to quality check your work.

- Find the clips and images for the videos.

- Complete a ~1-minute video Test task.



Pay:



- Paid $1 per minute of video length (12-25 minutes)

- Bonuses based on videos performance

- Paid on the 1st and 15th of every month

- Must have a working Payoneer account linked to your Onlinejobs*



If you are interested, just send a short message with your experience as a video editor and "VE-26G4" as the subject, so we know you are serious. If you have the experience we are looking for, we will send you the application/ test task link.



We appreciate all applicants, and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Shopify Product Manager
description:
IMPORTANT: Only apply if you have real experience working with Shopify stores that sell physical products (DTC e-commerce). If you do not have this experience, do NOT apply.



We are looking for a Shopify Product Manager to help build and scale a fast-growing e-commerce brand.



This is not a basic VA role. You must understand how product listing works, how to setup collections, how to source new products to expand the collections and how to create high-quality visuals that match a brand.



Your responsibilities:



* Create Shopify product listings (titles, descriptions, images)

* Generate high-quality product images using AI tools (Gemini, Midjourney, etc.)

* Edit and improve product images to match brand style

* Add and organize products into the right collections

* Expand collections with new relevant products

* Research and suggest new products that fit the brand

* Maintain a clean, structured, high-quality store



Requirements:



* Proven experience with Shopify (must)

* Experience with DTC e-commerce brands (physical products only)

* Strong understanding of product listings and product page structure

* Experience with AI tools for product images

* Ability to work fast and accurately

* Strong attention to detail

* Fluent English



DO NOT APPLY IF:



* You are a basic data entry VAs

* You have mainly a customer service backend experience (We are looking for front end operators)

* People that have basic experience with shopify or listing (less than 1,5 year? DO NOT APPLY)

* People without real e-commerce experience



To apply, you MUST answer the following:



1. How many years of experience do you have with Shopify product listings?



2. What kind of companies have you worked for and what was your responsibility?

   (Be specific — were these DTC e-commerce brands selling physical products?)



3. Send 2–3 Shopify product pages you personally created



4. Do you have experience with AI tools like Gemini, Midjourney, etc. to create high quality AI product page images? (Attach proof)



6. Do you have experience sourcing or suggesting new products for collections? If yes, explain how you approach this.



7. Record a short Loom (max 2 minutes) explaining your experience.



8. Do you have other Ecommerce/operation skills that you can bring in to the company?



Applications that do not answer ALL questions will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow into a key operator in the business.

title: Ads Specialist (Google & Meta)
description: We are looking for an experienced Ads Specialist to manage and optimise our Google and Meta advertising campaigns for a growing fitness brand. You will be responsible for campaign setup, audience targeting, creative testing, and ongoing performance optimisation to drive qualified leads and sales. The role requires a strong understanding of paid acquisition, data analysis, and scaling profitable campaigns within the health and fitness space.
