title: Hiring Specialist
description:
LegacyX Hiring helps businesses build high-performing remote teams by connecting them with top overseas talent. We handle the entire process end-to-end - so clients get pre-vetted, proven candidates without the headache. We’re just getting started and looking to grow our team - which is where you come in.



As our Hiring Specialist, you’ll own the full recruitment cycle from posting roles to onboarding placed candidates - and play a direct role in delivering results for our clients. There’s no big HR team behind you and no rigid playbook to follow. Just a real opportunity to make this function yours. This role starts part-time with a clear path to full-time for the right person - we want someone driven and ambitious who sees this as a launchpad, not just a job.



What You'll Do

Write and post job descriptions across job boards and platforms

Source candidates proactively - don't just wait for applications to come in

Screen applicants through resume review and initial interviews

Conduct interviews to assess candidate skills, experience, and culture fit

Coordinate interview scheduling between candidates and clients

Manage candidates through the full pipeline from first contact to offer

Keep ATS records accurate and up to date - track recruiting metrics and surface issues before they become problems

Send clients regular updates on recruiting — where candidates stand, what’s next, and any blockers

Support the onboarding process for newly placed candidates



What We're Looking For

1+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience

Fluent in English - strong written and verbal communication is a must

Scrappy, resourceful, and autonomous - you figure things out and don’t wait to be told what to do

Driven and ambitious - you don’t just meet the bar, you raise it

Comfortable with ambiguity and able to juggle multiple roles without dropping the ball



Why You'll Love This Role

Pay rate: $5–7 USD per hour, based on experience

Part-time to start - strong performers move to full-time

100% remote - work from anywhere in the world

Real ownership from day one - your work directly shapes how we grow and deliver for clients

A front-row seat to scaling a business - with the opportunity to grow your role as we do

title: Ecommerce Brand Social Media Manager (Instagram & Facebook – Content, Engagement & Trust Building)
description:
IMPORTANT: Only apply if you have proven experience managing and growing social media accounts for DTC e-commerce brands (physical products/Identity brand). If you do not have this experience, do NOT apply.



We are looking for a Social Media Manager who understands how to create content that builds trust, engagement, and brand identity.



This is NOT a basic social media role. We are not looking for someone who just posts content. We are looking for someone who understands what makes people follow, engage, and trust a brand.



We are a fast-growing brand in the US market (US army / patriotic niche), and content quality is critical for our growth.



Your responsibilities:



* Create daily content for Instagram &
 (posts, captions, visuals)

* Develop content that builds trust and emotional connection with the audience

* Research the niche (Army, patriotism, identity-driven content)

* Analyze competitors and identify what content performs well

* Turn insights into high-performing content ideas

* Manage comments and engagement (community building)

* Support engagement strategies under posts and ads

* Maintain a consistent, high-quality brand look and feel

* Write blog-style content/posts that increase trust and authority



This role is for someone who:



* Understands what makes content engaging (not just “nice looking”)

* Knows how to create content that resonates emotionally

* Thinks in hooks, storytelling, and audience psychology

* Can work independently and take ownership

* Is constantly improving and testing new ideas



Requirements:



* Proven experience with DTC / e-commerce brands (must)

* Experience creating content for physical product brands

* Strong understanding of Instagram &
 growth

* Ability to research audience behavior and trends

* Experience with AI tools for content (ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.)

* Strong English writing skills (captions + content)

* Attention to detail and consistency



We are NOT looking for:



* Basic social media assistants

* People who only schedule posts

* People without real results or proof



To apply, you MUST answer the following:



1. How many years of experience do you have managing social media for DTC e-commerce brands?



2. What type of brands have you worked with?

   (Be specific — were these physical product brands?)



3. Send 3–5 social media posts you created for DTC brands.

   Explain what YOU did and why those posts worked.



4. What makes a post “high-performing” in your opinion?

   (Be specific — hooks, structure, psychology, etc.)



5. How would you approach creating content for a army / patriotic brand?



6. Do you have experience with AI tools for content creation?

   If yes, explain your workflow.



7. Do you have experience writing blog-style content or posts for trust-building?

   If yes, explain.



8. Record a short Loom (max 2 minutes) explaining your approach to content.



Applications that do not answer ALL questions will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone long-term who can become a key part of the brand and grow with us.

title: Senior Cloud Accountant
description:
Join the Team as a Senior  Cloud Accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!

Philippine CPA license highly preferred.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+ years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Long Form YouTube Video Editor
description:
Hello, we are looking for a competent YouTube video editor to join our team. You must be able to create 3 to 4 videos per week. The editing style is very simple.





For every project, some assets, a script, and a voiceover will be provided. You will also be given access to royalty-free stock footage.



The rate is $1 per minute of edited footage.



This is a long-term opportunity.



I look forward to hearing from you :)

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Cutter / Video Editor for Ecommerce Brand
description:
Summary

Then you’re exactly who we’re looking for.

Your role:

 & Instagram with one clear goal: sales

Then reach out and apply – with a short intro and work samples if you have any.

title: SETTING CALLER FOR UPSELL — EARN $2000-4000/MONTH -- NO COLD CALLS (MALE ONLY)
description:

COMPENSATION

$
weekly. discussed before doing a trial once your application has been retained.

 or WhatsApp:

title: SALES REPRESENTATIVE (COLD CALLING & CLOSING) – REMOTE
description:
Everluxe Property Care | Sydney, Australia



Everluxe Property Care is a rapidly growing premium commercial and residential cleaning company based in Sydney, Australia.



We specialise in high-standard property care services across:



Commercial facilities

Real estate and strata

Childcare centres

Gyms and warehouses

Residential end-of-lease and deep cleaning



Due to continued growth, we are expanding our sales team and are seeking a high-performance Sales Representative to join us remotely.



ROLE OVERVIEW



This is a results-driven outbound sales role focused on cold calling, lead generation, and closing opportunities across both commercial and residential sectors.



You will be responsible for engaging decision-makers, presenting our services professionally, and converting leads into booked jobs and long-term contracts.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Conduct a minimum of 250 outbound cold calls per day

Engage with:

Builders and construction companies

Real estate agencies and property managers

Childcare centres

Pharmacies and retail businesses

Commercial property operators

Residential clients

Identify client needs and present tailored cleaning solutions

Qualify leads and book appointments or close sales directly

Follow structured sales scripts and internal processes

Accurately track calls, outcomes, and follow-ups

Maintain a professional, confident, and results-focused approach at all times

WORK SCHEDULE

Monday to Friday

Start time: 5:30 AM (Philippines time)

Minimum 40 hours per week

Additional hours may be required based on workload and performance

COMPENSATION & GROWTH

Base salary: $400 USD per month

Paid weekly: $100 USD

Performance-based salary increases

Opportunity to progress into senior sales and closing roles

Long-term growth within an expanding international company

CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

Previous sales or call centre experience preferred

Ability to handle high call volumes consistently

Comfortable managing rejection and maintaining performance

Strong work ethic, discipline, and reliability

Ability to take feedback and implement improvements quickly

Stable internet connection and professional work environment

IMPORTANT: SUITABILITY



This is a high-performance role suited to individuals who are:



Self-motivated and goal-oriented

Comfortable working in a structured, target-driven environment

Focused on long-term growth and skill development



This role is not suitable for candidates seeking low-pressure or passive work.



APPLICATION PROCESS (MANDATORY)



To be considered, applicants must send a WhatsApp message to:




Please answer all of the following questions:



What is the highest number of cold calls you have made in one day?

Why are you willing to make 250 cold calls per day?

How do you handle rejection repeatedly?

Describe your previous sales or call centre experience.

What time will you wake up daily to start at 5:30 AM PH time?

What makes you different from most applicants?

Are you seeking comfort or growth? Explain.

Can you start immediately?



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



INTERVIEW PROCESS

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a WhatsApp video interview (commencing immediately)

Candidates will be assessed on communication, professionalism, and sales ability

ABOUT EVERLUXE PROPERTY CARE



Everluxe Property Care is committed to delivering premium, reliable, and scalable cleaning solutions across Sydney.



We pride ourselves on:



Professional systems and processes

High-quality service standards

Long-term client relationships

Continuous growth and expansion

title: Executive Assistant / Project Manager
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Team Admin / Executive Assistant / Project Manager to support leadership and keep the team operating smoothly.



This role is for someone who thinks in systems, spots gaps before they become problems, stays ahead of deadlines, and keeps the entire team aligned without needing constant supervision. You are here to support leadership, manage projects, and keep systems running smoothly so the rest of the team can focus on execution.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems, high standards, and real impact, not just managing tasks for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning scattered ideas into structured plans with clear owners and deadlines? Are you the type who follows up before being asked and catches details others miss? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting processes properly, and keeping teams aligned without constant supervision?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Admin & Team Support

- Manage calendars, meetings, follow-ups, and reminders

- Handle inbox organization and message triage

- Prepare documents, trackers, and internal updates

- Keep files, folders, and naming systems clean and consistent



Project Management

- Track ongoing projects, deadlines, and dependencies

- Break down tasks and assign owners

- Follow up on deliverables and flag risks early

- Keep project boards and trackers up to date (e.g. Notion, Monday, ClickUp, Sheets)



Systems & Process

- Build and improve simple systems that reduce back-and-forth

- Document SOPs and workflows as things evolve

- Spot inefficiencies and automation opportunities, and suggest, design, and implement improvements

- Maintain dashboards, trackers, and recurring reports



Communication & Coordination

- Act as the bridge between leadership and the team

- Clarify priorities and next steps after meetings

- Ensure instructions are understood and executed correctly

- Keep everyone aligned without micromanaging



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience & Capability

- Must have extensive experience as an executive assistant, chief of staff, or operations associate

- Project management experience and comfortable managing and driving multiple large projects

- Must have previous experience managing people. You may not have any direct reports, but the experience is important

- Must have experience automating workflows and designing workflow processes with automation in mind. You may not be individually responsible for building them, but you should already have the experience to handle basic tasks and understand how the process works

- Comfortable with outcome and goal-based delegation and does not need to be told individual tasks

- Experience with Google Suite and GoHighLevel CRM is a plus, but not required

- Should be fluent in AI, but not reliant on it to think for you



Work Style & Standards

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Excellent organizational skills

- Excellent time management skills

- Strong written communication

- Strong written and spoken English communication skills; near-native level preferred

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

- Must love creating, refining, and working with standard operating processes (SOPs)

- Proactive. You don’t wait to be told something is broken, you anticipate it before it breaks

- Must move with a sense of speed and urgency in everything



Ownership & Mindset

- Extremely growth-oriented and hungry to learn

- You are the type of person who follows through every single time, no matter what, and always gets the job done. No excuses, no matter what pops up

- You are the type of person who is delighted when the client or the person you're preparing something for is delighted

- You want meaningful work around people who are incredibly smart, hard-working, and dedicated, with a phenomenal culture. We work hard, but we have fun doing it together



Availability & Technical Requirements

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION IS REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Must be willing to work long hours and be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (not necessarily working 12 hours a day, but reliably reachable and able to respond quickly if something urgent comes up)



Preferred:

- Experience working as a process engineer, manufacturing engineer, or industrial engineer is preferred, but not required

- Experience designing team workflows, augmenting existing workflows with automation, and/or automating existing workflows is a strong bonus, but not required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.





STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project, estimated to be 2-3 hours of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Team Admin / Assistant / Project Manager with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

NOTE: This is a project-based role with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.







STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Graphic Designer with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: B2B Sales Development Representative and Business Development Representative
description:
We are hiring 1 SDR and 1 BDR ASAP!!!



If you're looking for easy, low-pressure work where you send a few
s and collect a paycheck—close this tab now.

But if you're a hunter—someone who thrives on the phone, gets energy from real conversations, handles rejection like a pro, and wants to actually earn based on results—keep reading.



About Us: 

We provide software solutions to car dealerships across the United States. 



100+ active dealership clients – this isn't a startup guessing at product-market fit

13+ years of founder experience running buy centers

500+ product demos conducted by the founder personally



You'll be calling US car dealers—Used Car Managers, Acquisition Managers, General Managers—the people who d
 what tools their dealership buys. These are busy, direct, no-BS businesspeople. If you can earn their attention, you can earn real money here.



Key Responsibilities:



We're hiring for two distinct roles. Read both descriptions carefully and apply for the one that fits your skills and experience. If you're not sure, apply for SDR—top performers get promoted to BDR.

SDR – Sales Development Representative

"The Hunter" | High-Volume Outbound Calling

Your Mission: Fill the top of the funnel. Make 60–80+ calls per day. Find decision-makers. Qualify leads. Pass them to BDRs.

You're great at: Cold calling, handling rejection, getting past gatekeepers, researching contacts, high-volume work.

You're NOT doing: Demos, proposals, closing. You hand off qualified leads to BDRs.

Best for: People who love the grind, have thick skin, and want to prove themselves.

BDR – Business Development Representative

"The Closer's Partner" | Pipeline & Relationship Management

Your Mission: Convert qualified leads into booked demos. Follow up relentlessly. Help get contracts signed.

You're great at: Building relationships, managing pipelines, persistent follow-up, professional communication.

You're NOT doing: Product demos or price negotiations. The founder does all demos and closing. You book meetings, prep materials, chase paperwork.

Best for: People with sales experience who want to work fewer accounts at higher stakes.



Requirements/Qualifications:



Compensation Structure:



You get a guaranteed base every month—no clawbacks. Commission is uncapped. The harder you work, the more you earn. 



SDR (Sales Development Representative)

Guaranteed Base Salary: $1,200 -$1,500/month

Target OTE (On-Target Earnings): $1,800 – $2,200/month

Top Performer OTE: $2,400+/month

Growth Path: Promoted to BDR



BDR (Business Development Representative)

Guaranteed Draw: $1,500 - $2,000/month

Target OTE (On-Target Earnings): $3,000 – $4,000/month

Top Performer OTE: $4,000+/month

Growth Path: Senior BDR / Team Lead



How to Apply:

Take an online assessment through this link- 



The assessment includes written questions and audio responses. Please ensure you answer all questions and upload your CV as an attachment.



Important: The audio assessment is a required first step in our hiring process. It allows us to evaluate your English fluency and communication skills. Only candidates who meet all qualifications will move forward to the next stage.

title: Director of Database Management & Client Care (Real Estate Conversion Specialist)
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a high-performance Inside Sales Agent (ISA) with elite CRM management skills to act as the primary engine for lead conversion and the logistical hub for our real estate operations. In this role, you own the "Voice of the Business" and are responsible for turning raw interest into set appointments through aggressive outbound calling, meticulous follow-up, and CRM automation. You will manage the entire lifecycle of property showings and agent feedback loops while maintaining total data integrity.



WORKING HOURS: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM PST



DAILY WORKFLOW



System Audit & Lead Sync (11:00 AM – 1:00 PM):

- Audit lead generation from our VA who is doing the generation in new ad leads and engage with "hand-raisers" from social media comments/DMs to capture phone numbers.

- Address all GoHighLevel (GHL) responses and clean pipeline statuses specifically based on transaction data provided by our transaction coordinator (Director of TC).



Production, Newsletter & Logistics (1:00 PM – 4:00 PM):

- Showing Management: Coordinate with agents to schedule property access and ensure a seamless tour experience.

- Feedback Loops: Call every agent who accessed a listing for raw feedback; compile these notes into the "Weekly Seller Report" and send it to Graeham to manage seller strategy.

- Marketing Assembly: Receive high-end visual assets from video editor/content creator and strategic hooks to assemble and segment newsletter blasts in GHL.



Prime Time Conversion (4:00 PM – 7:00 PM):

- Execute outbound calls to hot leads and past clients while they are at home.

- The "Bridge Call" Protocol: You must initiate a call or text within 5 minutes of a recipient clicking a property link more than twice or a new lead syncing into the system.



The Closing & Review Loop:

- Wait 48 hours post-closing to confirm the client received their gift (wine or oil/vinegar).

- Ask and send them a link to do a review after closing.

- Execute follow-up check-ins 2–4 weeks post-close to ensure the client is settled.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (MANDATORY)

1. Voice Recording: Attach a Loom or Vocaroo link introducing yourself. We require tonal authority and professional, clear English. As the "Voice of the Business," your ability to build trust over the phone is your primary asset.

2. Success Metrics & Experiments: Provide a summary of your lead conversion experience. We want to see how you have tested different protocols (e.g., speed-to-lead times or CRM tagging strategies) to increase appointment set rates.

3. Conflict Resolution Scenario: In your application, explain exactly how you would handle two showing agents demanding the same 2:00 PM Saturday slot for a hot listing without escalating the friction to someone else.



TECHNICAL SKILL STACK

- GoHighLevel (GHL): Advanced proficiency in segmentation, tagging, and pipeline hygiene.

- Any.do & Box: Familiarity with workspace monitoring; we operate on a system where no task is marked "Complete" without verified proof of the asset or logged call. We can teach you this.

- Climbo: Experience with review management is a plus (we will train you on our specific review-capture script).



COMPENSATION

- Hourly Rate: Negotiable based on experience and verified conversion skill.

- Incentives: Bonus per closing starting at $40, with potential for performance-based increases as you hit conversion milestones.

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented video editor to help create high-quality, engaging videos. The ideal candidate should have experience working with raw footage from phone recordings and be able to enhance content through expert editing, seamless transitions, and creative additions.



What You'll Do:

1. Tailored Workflow & Enhanced Quality: Optimize raw footage with noise reduction, audio leveling, and effects to elevate overall content quality.

2. Precise Editing & Efficiency: Edit and enhance videos while ensuring quick turnaround times without compromising quality.

3. Professional Video Editing: Deliver precise and creative edits to match the project’s needs.

4. Post-Production: Provide comprehensive post-production services to ensure polished, professional results.

5. Color Correction: Apply color grading and correction to enhance the visual appeal of videos.

6. Sound Design: Add background music, improve audio quality, and create an immersive audio experience.

7. Creative Storytelling: Make decisions on where to insert B-rolls, animations, zoom transitions, and graphics to make videos more engaging.

8. Subtitles & Captions: Add subtitles for accessibility and engagement.

9. Organizing Clips & Footage: Structure videos from beginning to end with a seamless flow.

10. Transitions & Video Effects: Implement smooth transitions and effects for a professional touch.

11. Intro & Outro: Create engaging intros and outros to enhance brand identity.

12. Multiple Revisions: Open to feedback and revisions to achieve the desired final product.



Ideal Candidate:



- Experienced in editing phone-recorded content

- Creative and detail-oriented

- Understands sound design and background music selection

- Proficient in color grading and correction

- Skilled in using professional video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, etc.)

- Efficient and deadline-driven



If you're passionate about video editing and can transform raw footage into engaging, high-quality content, we'd love to hear from you!



To apply, please send:

1. Examples of past video editing work

2. Are you willing to sign an NDA before getting the materials to edit?

3. Your typical turnaround time for a 3-5 minute video

4. Are you willing to create a short sample? We will provide raw footage for the test.

title: Amazon Compliance Specialist
description:
Regulatory & Legal Compliance



Conduct in-depth research on FDA, EPA, FTC, and other relevant federal and state regulations.

Ensure compliance with international product safety standards (EU, UK, Canada, Asia-Pacific) when applicable.

Perform ongoing monitoring of regulatory updates and interpret implications for product categories.

Support intellectual property due diligence to prevent patent, copyright, or trademark infringement.



Risk Management & Product Compliance



Evaluate new and existing products for compliance risks and advise stakeholders on mitigation strategies.

Develop compliance testing protocols and coordinate with third-party labs and certification agencies.

Manage corrective actions, recalls, or withdrawals in alignment with Amazon’s policies and legal requirements.

Conduct audits of product listings and seller submissions to prevent unlawful or restricted product selection.



Cross-Functional Collaboration



Partner with Product Development, Supply Chain, and Seller Performance teams to execute compliance initiatives.

Provide clear guidance to vendors, suppliers, and internal teams on compliance requirements.

Train cross-functional stakeholders on compliance best practices and emerging regulatory risks.

Act as a subject matter expert to business teams during product launches, regulatory reviews, and inspections.



Policy & Process Development



Draft and implement compliance procedures, standard operating protocols (SOPs), and escalation processes.

Support automation and system-based compliance controls to scale monitoring and enforcement.

Contribute to internal policy development regarding restricted products, product claims, and safety certifications.

Continuously improve workflows to enhance accuracy, timeliness, and audit readiness.



Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of compliance assessments, approvals, and regulatory correspondence.

Prepare detailed reports and risk assessments for leadership review.

Provide supervisors with regular feedback on task progress, emerging risks, and resolution status.

Ensure confidentiality of sensitive data, supplier information, and Amazon business strategy.





Experience interacting directly with regulators including federal and state agencies

Experience in research and analyzing federal and state regulations

Familiarity and experience in dealing with FDA regulation is REQUIRED

Familiarity with international compliance frameworks (REACH, RoHS, CE marking).

Experience in compliance auditing, regulatory affairs, or legal review.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills for engaging with global teams and regulators.

Ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment with strict deadline

title: Shopify Store Manager
description:
Dear,



We are looking for an experienced and driven Shopify Store Manager to lead our frontend operations full-time. In 2025, we generated $12M+ in revenue and are continuing to scale as a fast-growing fashion dropshipping company. We are looking for a hands-on leader who can manage a team, optimize performance, and take full ownership of our frontend operations.



About the Role:

You will be responsible for leading a team of 10 people, including product listers, media buyers, video editors, ads launchers, and photo editors. You will oversee the full frontend operation from store performance and conversion rate optimization to ad creatives and new store builds.



MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH:



- Shopify (store management, store builds, CRO)

- Fashion dropshipping (managing stores in this niche specifically)

- Frontend operations (ads, creatives, funnels, product pages)

- Leading and coordinating a marketing/creative team



Responsibilities:



1) Managing and leading a team of 10 across multiple frontend departments.

2) Overseeing product listing, ad creative production, and media buying.

3) Optimizing conversion rates across all active stores.

4) Building and launching new Shopify stores from the ground up.

5) Tracking KPIs across departments and improving processes continuously.

6) Coordinating between media buyers, editors, and product listers to ensure aligned output.

7) Identifying bottlenecks and implementing systems to improve team efficiency.



Applicants must:



- Have proven experience managing Shopify stores in a fashion or dropshipping context.

- Have experience leading a team of at least 5+ people.

- Be available full-time and during weekends

- Be organized, process-driven, and results-oriented.

- Be available to start immediately or within short notice.



Application Instructions:



If you believe you are a good fit, please apply with a short introduction video of yourself (be original, do not read from a script).



Answer the following questions in your application (not in your video):



1) How many years of experience do you have with Shopify?

2) What was your most recent role, and what were your day-to-day responsibilities?

3) What type of e-commerce or dropshipping stores did you manage (markets, niches, number of stores)?

4) Do you have experience with Klaviyo? If yes, describe how you have used it.

5) Have you managed or built Shopify stores in the fashion niche specifically?

6) Can you describe your experience with frontend operations (ads, creatives, funnels, product pages)?

7) What are your experiences with Meta and Google ads?

8) Are you available full-time?

9) Are you available on weekends if needed?

10) Do you currently have other jobs or clients?

11) When can you start?



We are looking for someone who takes full ownership, leads with clarity, and consistently drives results.



I look forward to your proposal!



Best regards,

Tess

title: Influencer & Partnerships Coordinator (E-commerce Specialty Coffee Brand) *Part Time | Remote (Asia Time Zone)
description:
Innovative global coffee brand inventing one-of-a-kind tools redefining how coffee is experienced. We are looking for an Influencer & Partnerships Coordinator to build meaningful relationships across the coffee industry that support global campaigns and product launches.







ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

ICOSA Brewhouse is a globally recognized specialty coffee brand reshaping coffee culture around the world. (
  / 
 )



We design one-of-a-kind tools that elevate everyday rituals and introduce new ways of enjoying coffee.



From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, top cafés, and homebrewers across 100+ countries.



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.



As we continue to innovate, launch new products, and grow, we are looking for someone who will support in building and nurturing meaningful partnerships across the specialty coffee industry.



You will work directly with the founder and play an active role in shaping how ICOSA connects with competitors, industry leaders, and the coffee community globally.







YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

This is not a generic influencer outreach role.



You will be responsible for identifying, reaching out to, and developing relationships with coffee champions, competitors, industry leaders, and key opinion leaders (KOLs) within the specialty coffee community.



??You will help us:

• Identify and research relevant coffee professionals, coffee competitors, brands, and collaborators aligned with ICOSA’s Mission

 • Initiate thoughtful, personalized outreach on a daily basis in a way that fosters long-term relationships (not transactional exchanges)

 • Maintain a structured partnership pipeline and track all conversations inside our CRM system

 • Follow up proactively and ensure promising conversations are never lost

 • Coordinate collaboration discussions and next steps with clarity and organization

 • Provide weekly structured updates summarizing active conversations, progress, and upcoming opportunities

Over time, as trust and capability are demonstrated, there may be opportunities to expand scope into broader partnership coordination and system development.



What success looks like:

 • High-quality industry relationships are initiated and nurtured on a daily basis

 • Communication with KOLs is clear, thoughtful, and aligned with brand positioning

 • Regular improvements are made to the communication flow and strategy to improve engagement

 • Outreach efforts are organized and accurately tracked in a CRM

 • Promising conversations do not get lost or forgotten

 • Founders are supported daily update reports 



This role sits at the intersection of relationship-building and structured execution.



What this role is NOT:

• Not a sales quota-driven position

• Not limited to short-term campaign outreach

• Not a purely social media engagement role

• Not a transactional affiliate outreach or mass-DM automation role



This is relationship building inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

 • Communicates clearly and confidently in written English

 • Understands how to build rapport without being pushy

 • Is socially intelligent and able to read tone and context

 • Is organized and follows through consistently using established processes

 • Can represent a premium brand professionally

 • Is comfortable working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team



Must have skills or experience:

• 1–4 years experience in outreach, influencer marketing, partnerships, or community roles

• Strong, fluent written communication skills in English

• Is comfortable initiating conversations with high-level industry professionals

• Is naturally organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable tracking multiple conversations and follow-ups without being reminded

• Takes pride in clear, polished communication

• Comfort working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team

• Enjoys relationship building, but approaches it with structure

• Curious about how partnerships are built inside growing companies



Big pluses:

 • Familiarity with specialty coffee culture (ex. you know what makes Panama Geisha special)

 • Experience engaging with Instagram creators or industry experts in a niche

 • Experience building CRMs or improving existing workflows







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Work directly with founders who are deeply involved in product design and global campaigns.

• Contribute to campaigns that reach a global coffee audience.

• Operate close to innovation. See products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

• Be part of a team that is pioneering global coffee culture.



ou’ll be joining a close-knit team focused on building something meaningful through collaboration.



We care deeply about growth,not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership based on performance and initiative.



If that sounds exciting to you, you will feel at home here.







COMPENSATION AND WORKING STRUCTURE

• Hours: Begins as Part Time (10-15 hours per week), with potential to expand based on performance and ownership

• Fully remote. Asia time zone working hours required.

• You will collaborate directly with one of the founders

• Compensation range: $3.50-$6.00/hour (based on relevant experience and demonstrated capability)





HOW TO APPLY



Are you ready? 



If you’d like to join us on our journey and grow together with us, we’re looking forward to meeting you.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our application process easy to follow. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Complete the quick application: 
 

2. In the first question of the application start it with: "I’m (insert your name) from (insert your city/town) and my favourite food is (insert your favourite food). Then introduce yourself and why you think you’ll be a good fit for this position. 

3. We’ll be in touch with next steps for the interview once we receive it. 



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager (D2C E-commerce Coffee Brand) *Full Time | Remote (Asia Time Zone)
description:
Innovative global coffee brand inventing one-of-a-kind tools redefining how coffee is experienced. Seeking a Marketing Manager to own campaigns, launches, and cross-channel execution alongside founders.





ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

ICOSA Brewhouse is a globally recognized specialty coffee brand redefining how coffee is experienced. We are shaping coffee culture around the world. (
  / 
 )



We design and invent one-of-a-kind tools that didn’t exist before — tools that elevate everyday rituals and introduce new ways of enjoying coffee.



From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, in top cafés, and in homes in 100+ countries around the world. 



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.

You won’t just publish content.



You’ll help shape how new products are introduced, how campaigns are structured, and how our global community experiences our brand — while ensuring execution remains disciplined, consistent, and scalable.







YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

This is a senior marketing operator role. Execution is central — but it is not a junior content posting role.



You will work directly with our Marketing Lead to:

• Own day-to-day marketing delivery across core channels

• Structure and execute campaigns from planning through rollout

• Translate ideas into clear, executable briefs

• Coordinate creative production across internal, outsourced, and AI-assisted workflows

• Strengthen how our marketing engine operates over time



You will see early product prototypes.

You will contribute to campaign discussions before launch.

You will help shape how innovation is presented to a global audience.



Execution is central to this role — but so is judgment, ownership, and the ability to think in campaigns rather than isolated posts.





What you’ll own:



(1) Marketing Execution Across Channels

• Own social media execution (Instagram and
).

• Plan and manage content calendars aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure consistent publishing and follow-through across platforms.

• Manage inbox and community engagement, including partnership or influencer communication if required.

• Execute
 campaigns aligned with launches, promotions, and collaborations.



You ensure marketing execution remains structured, timely, and dependable.



(2) Campaign Rollout & Launch Execution

• Support and execute seasonal campaigns, product launches, collaborations, and promotional initiatives.

• Translate marketing objectives into structured creative briefs.

• Coordinate creative asset development across designers, freelancers, and AI-supported workflows.

• Oversee cohesive cross-channel rollout so messaging, visuals, and timing align across social,
, and paid efforts.

• Strengthen campaign structure and rollout processes over time.



You think in campaigns — not just content pieces.



(3) Creative Briefing & Quality Control

• Create clear, structured briefs for design and content production.

• Maintain high standards of aesthetic consistency, messaging clarity, and brand voice integrity across both human and AI-assisted workflows.

• Draft copy or guide AI-assisted content creation when needed, ensuring outputs remain on-brand and high quality.

• Review creative outputs for brand alignment before escalation to the Marketing Lead.

• Collaborate comfortably in tools such as Figma or similar platforms to support execution and alignment.



You don’t need to be a designer — but you should have strong creative judgment.



(4) Growth & Operational Development

• Identify opportunities to refine workflows and strengthen how our marketing engine operates.

• Lead or contribute to structured testing and rollout of new channels or initiatives as capacity allows.

• Over time, take increasing ownership of campaign structuring, cross-channel coordination, partnership campaign oversight, and creative alignment across performance-driven efforts.



As you demonstrate reliability and judgment, your scope expands meaningfully.





What success looks like:

• Social and
 channels operate smoothly with consistent execution and strong brand alignment.

• Campaigns are rolled out in a coordinated, cross-channel manner without last-minute chaos.

• Creative briefs are structured, clear, and reduce friction across collaborators.

• Marketing execution no longer bottlenecks leadership attention.

• Early experiments in new channels or initiatives are tested in a structured way.



Over time, you become a trusted execution leader within the marketing team.





What This Role Is Not:

• Not a pure content creator role.

• Not a brand strategist role.

• Not a paid media buyer role.

• Not an administrative coordinator role.



This is a senior marketing operator position inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

• Understands how structured marketing campaigns come together.

• Can translate ideas into clear execution plans.

• Is comfortable owning delivery without hand-holding.

• Is comfortable reviewing performance data and using insights to inform execution decisions.

• Is strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



You are strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



Must have skills or experience:

• 4–6+ years of experience managing marketing and/or social for a brand.

• Experience executing structured marketing campaigns.

• Experience within D2C or product-based brands strongly preferred.

• Comfortable operating inside e-commerce environments.

• Highly detail-oriented and disciplined in follow-through.

• Strong creative judgment and ability to assess content quality and brand alignment.

• Comfort collaborating in design tools such as Figma.

• Comfortable working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team.



Big pluses:

• Experience supporting product launches or crowdfunding campaigns.

• Experience creating, implementing, and refining marketing processes or building SOPs.

• Experience coordinating freelancers or creative collaborators.

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or similar
 platforms.

• Exposure to AI-assisted marketing workflows.







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Work directly with founders who are deeply involved in product design, positioning, and global campaigns.

• Operate close to innovation — seeing products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

• Contribute to campaigns that reach a global coffee audience.

• Have real ownership inside a small, high-performing team where your work is visible and impactful.

• Help shape coffee culture around the world.



We are a fully remote team — but we operate with structure and discipline.



You’ll be joining a close-knit group focused on building something meaningful with collaboration and accountability. There is no office politics. No unnecessary hierarchy. Just people committed to high standards.



We care deeply about growth — not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership, lead initiatives, and shape how our marketing evolves.



If you want a role where:

• Your ideas are heard.

• Your execution matters.

• Your scope can grow with your capability.

You will feel at home here.







COMPENSATION AND WORKING STRUCTURE

Full time: 40 hours/week 

Compensation range: $1,100-$1,800 (based on relevant experience and demonstrated capability)

Up to 16 days of paid time off annually

Asia time zone working hours required







HOW TO APPLY

Are you ready? 



If you’d like to join us on our journey and grow together with us, we’re looking forward to meeting you.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our application process extremely efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Complete the quick application: 
 

2. In the first question of the application start it with: "I’m (insert your name) from (insert your city/town) and my favourite food is (insert your favourite food). Then introduce yourself and why you think you’ll be a good fit for this position. 

3. We’ll be in touch with next steps for the interview once we receive it. 



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: [Urgent Hiring] Virtual Procurement Admin – WFH (Contractual - Renewable)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

Negentropy Limited is a Hong Kong–based social marketing agency operating in the fast-paced e-commerce space. We work with performance-driven teams focused on execution, speed, and results.



We are not a “chill” company. We are a high-accountability environment where people are expected to deliver, improve, and take ownership daily.



THE ROLE:

We are hiring a detail-obsessed, highly reliable Virtual Procurement Admin who can support daily operations, ensure accuracy, and keep execution on track.



This role is for someone who:

- Takes ownership without being chased

- Communicates clearly and proactively

- Handles confidential information with integrity

- Thrives in a fast-moving, performance-based environment

If you need constant reminders, supervision, or excuses to function — this role is not for you.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Monitor stock levels and identify purchasing needs

- Research, evaluate, and coordinate with potential vendors and suppliers

- Track purchase orders and ensure timely delivery of goods

- Update internal databases with order details (dates, vendors, quantities, pricing, and discounts)

- Conduct market research to identify pricing trends and cost-saving opportunities

- Negotiate with vendors to secure competitive and cost-effective deals

- Prepare and analyze cost and procurement reports

- Maintain accurate records of invoices, purchase orders, and contracts

- Follow up with suppliers to confirm, adjust, or resolve order concerns

- Coordinate with warehouse or internal teams to ensure items arrive in good condition



STANDARDS & WORK STYLE:

Our team operates on trust, clarity, and consistent execution. People who thrive here tend to naturally demonstrate:

- Integrity in Communication – Sharing accurate updates, even when things are not perfect

- Consistency – Showing up prepared, on time, and dependable across days—not just on good days

- Ownership Mindset – Following through on commitments and proactively closing gaps without being chased

- Structured Work Habits – Comfort with documented workflows, tracking systems, and clear visibility of work progress

- Professional Discipline – Maintaining a stable work environment and managing responsibilities with minimal oversight

- This role suits individuals who value clarity, accountability, and steady performance over time.



APPLICATION FIT:

- Candidates who tend to do well in this role are those who:

- Prefer clear expectations and structured processes 

- Take pride in delivering complete, accurate work 

- Communicate early when challenges arise (rather than after deadlines) 

- Are comfortable having their work reviewed and measured against standards 



On the other hand, this role may feel restrictive for those who:

- Prefer highly flexible or loosely defined work setups 

- Work best without structured tracking or accountability systems 

- Find it challenging to maintain consistency in attendance or output 

- Rely on rushed, unreviewed, or templated outputs instead of careful execution 



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or any related field (fresh graduates are welcome)

- Experience in Purchasing, Procurement, or a similar role is an advantage

- Proficient in Google Sheets (comfortable with formulas and data handling)

- Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Detail-oriented with good documentation and organizational skills

- Able to manage multiple tasks, analyze information, and resolve issues effectively

- Team-oriented with strong coordination and listening skills

- Practical, logical, and goal-driven in approach



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:

- Stable internet connection (minimum 50 - 100 Mbps)

Laptop/PC with at least:

- 8GB RAM

- Intel i5 (or equivalent) or higher

- 256GB storage or higher

For Mac Users:

- 8GB unified memory or more

- Apple M1 chip or newer (or Intel i5 and above)

- 256GB SSD or more



SALARY: ?18,000–?22,000 per month



WORK SCHEDULE & SETUP:

- Employment Type: Contractual

- Contract Term: 6 months (renewable based on performance and business needs)

- Work Setup: Remote 

- 5 working days per week with 2 rest days

- 8 working hours per day with a 1-hour lunch break

- Schedule may vary depending on business needs

- Must have own laptop and a reliable internet connection

title: Customer Experience & Operations Associate (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote | Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Sales Closer (High-Ticket Marketing Services)

Reviewing calls and improving conversion rate

You are uncomfortable closing paid offers
