title: SEO / SEM Specialist
description:
Full time career opportunity – diverse B2B/B2C Digital Sales & Marketing role in consumer products – growing responsibilities

A great long term career opportunity awaits a driven, agile, digital-savvy, hungry-to-learn individual who wants to take on growing responsibilities in using AI to drive digital sales and marketing for two exciting Australian consumer brands.

I own two established consumer brands (both have been around for over 50 years), historically operating in the wholesale space (800+ stockists). Over the last couple of years, the B2C channel has grown in importance and its simply too much workload for me to manage. 

Your workload would consist of 2-3 hours per day of digital development work (enhancing websites functionalities and SEO improvements) another 1-2 hour on digital marketing initiatives (from EDMs to SEM) and the remainder on managing marketplace offerings and promotions.  You will implement digital support projects (eg editing product images in Canva, generating AI images for digital ads, managing & optimising google ads, updating online marketplace listings on eBay, Iconic, Faire, Fieldfolio, Fruugo, Amazon) as well as responding to social media posts and posting pro-actively on social media (less than 2 hours per week). You are expected to explore how to use AI tools to make this work more efficient. 

You already have experience in Digital Sales Support, consider yourself a fast learner and self-starter who is willing to take on additional responsibilities to support all sales activity through all our digital sales channels. You have a can-do attitude and are comfortable handling multiple tasks simultaneously.

Advanced Microsoft office experience is required, including having previously managed websites and online marketplaces such as eBay and Amazon. You have significant experience using Shopify and Ahrefs and have a good working knowledge with Canva and AI image generation. You have capability to manage SEO and Google Ads, are an expert in building backlinks, improving keywords and have some experience with AI tools such as Claude Cowork, Gemini and are keen to trial new tools in this space. You have experience managing marketplace sales such as Amazon and are driven by improving sales. Some website development experience would also be beneficial. Any challenges you face that are not defined by our procedures, you are willing to research yourself (eg youtube videos) to figure out how to do something. 

The role is fulltime with salary increases over time in line with increased responsibilities. Hours are Monday to Friday and we honor most Filipino holidays except for All Saints and All Souls Day. Once you complete your 6 months’ probation, you are eligible for a 13th month salary.

This is a fantastic full-time career opportunity and the owner of the business is willing to invest a lot of time into your development. As such, if you are only after a short-term contract or prefer to continue doing some gig-work on the side, this role is not for you.

title: Remote Operations & Car Parts Coordinator (Automotive)
description:
Location: Remote



We are a fast-growing, digital-first car dealership based in Sweden, specializing in online car sales with nationwide delivery. We are now looking for a highly structured and detail-oriented Remote Operations & Parts Coordinator to become a key part of our logistics and workshop operations.



This is NOT a passive admin role. You will act as a central “control tower” in our operations — ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



Parts & Suppliers:

- Identify and order car parts based on internal requests

- Communicate with suppliers (pricing, availability, delivery times)

- Track all orders and ensure timely delivery

- Follow up on delays and missing shipments



Operations & Flow Control:

- Monitor all vehicles in our system (Airtable)

- Identify cars that are “stuck” or delayed in the process

- Flag issues proactively (missing parts, unbooked services, delays)

- Ensure every car always has a clear next step

- Coordinate with internal tea
mbers via Slack



Daily Execution:

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date data in Airtable

- Post daily summaries of priorities and issues

- Follow up with tea
mbers until tasks are completed



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



- No car is “forgotten” or left without a next step

- Parts are ordered quickly and tracked accurately

- Delays are identified BEFORE they become problems

- The team always knows what needs to be done next



---



 WHO YOU ARE



- Extremely organized and structured

- Proactive — you don’t wait for instructions

- Comfortable managing many tasks at once

- Strong communicator in English (written)

- Detail-oriented and reliable

- Problem-solver mindset



---



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience in automotive industry

- Experience with Airtable, Slack or similar tools

- Experience in logistics, operations, or supply chain



---



 TOOLS YOU WILL USE



- Airtable (main system)

- Slack (team communication)

- Google / supplier websites



---



WHY THIS ROLE IS UNIQUE



- You will play a critical role in a fast-scaling company

- High level of ownership and responsibility

- Clear structure, but also freedom to improve processes

- Opportunity to grow into a larger operations role over time



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:

1. A short video introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with similar roles

3. An example of how you stay organized when handling many tasks



---



We are looking for someone reliable, structured, and hungry to grow. If you enjoy creating order, solving problems, and being the person who keeps everything running smoothly — this role is for you.

title: Amazon Graphic Designer
description:
INNELS is a full-service Marketplace Agency helping European and US brands grow and scale on Amazon.



We are currently looking for a talented Amazon Graphic Designer to join our team. This is a part-time hourly position with the potential to transition into a full-time role as workload increases.



Responsibilities:

*Design high-converting Amazon listing images (main images, lifestyle images, infographics, A+ Content).

*Create visually compelling graphics optimized for Amazon conversion and click-through rates.

*Use AI tools to generate lifestyle images when clients don’t provide them.

*Edit and enhance product images to meet Amazon guidelines and best practices.

*Develop brand-consistent visual content across multiple listings and marketplaces.

*Collaborate with the marketing and account management team to align visuals with strategy.

*Continuously test and improve creatives based on performance data.

*Stay up to date with Amazon design trends and AI design tools.



Requirements:

*Proven experience designing for Amazon listings (portfolio required).

*Strong skills in Photoshop, Figma, Illustrator,  design tools.

*Experience using AI image generation tools for creating or enhancing visuals.

*Ability to create lifestyle images, infographics, and product storytelling visuals.

Please send your CV

title: Amazon FBA logistics assistant
description:
INNELS is a full-service Marketplace Agency helping European and US brands grow and scale on Amazon, TikTok Shop, and other marketplaces.



We are currently looking for Amazon Logistics Assistant to join our team. Experience with Amazon FBA & FBM is a must.



Responsibilities:

- Assist in the day-to-day management of Amazon FBA and FBM logistics operations.

- Create and manage Amazon FBA shipping plans in Seller Central.

- Coordinate shipments with suppliers, freight forwarders, and warehouses.

- Monitor FBA inventory levels and maintain healthy stock levels across marketplaces.

- Perform inventory forecasting and restocking planning based on sales data.

- Track and analyze Amazon FBA fees and identify potential cost optimizations.

- Monitor inbound shipments and resolve issues such as delays, discrepancies, or receiving problems.

- Manage FBM orders and ensure proper fulfillment operations.

- Maintain operational tracking files and reports using Excel.

- Support logistics coordination across multiple Amazon marketplaces, particularly EU markets.



Requirements:

- Experience working with Amazon Seller Central, specifically with FBA and FBM operations.

- Hands-on experience creating and managing FBA shipping plans.

- Understanding of Amazon logistics workflows, including inbound shipments, fulfillment processes, and inventory management.

- Experience with inventory forecasting and stock planning.

- Strong understanding of FBA fees and operational cost structures.

- Experience working with EU Amazon marketplaces is highly preferred.

- Strong Excel skills for inventory tracking, logistics reports, and operational planning.

- Strong organizational and operational skills.

- Data-driven mindset with ability to interpret logistics and inventory data.



How To Apply:

- Please send your CV

- Please describe your previous experience with Amazon FBA, FBM



We would like to start with part-time and then switch to full-time in the future.

title: Full-Stack / Platform Engineer (High-Throughput Systems)
description:
About the role

We are looking for a versatile engineer to build and scale a high-concurrency, multi-service platform. Our system powers real-time user interactions, sensitive financial transactions, and complex state management. You will work across a stack of web apps, APIs, and background workers where sub-second latency and data integrity are non-negotiable. We value engineers who prioritize clear service boundaries, safe schema migrations, and highly observable production environments.



What you’ll do

Real-Time UIs: Develop and maintain Next.js / React frontends that handle streaming data and high-frequency state updates.



Service Architecture: Design Node.js (Express-style) HTTP APIs and TypeScript services that manage complex user sessions and event-driven workflows.



Database Ownership: Manage PostgreSQL modeling and queries, ensuring high-performance migrations in coordination with live deployments.



Distributed Tasks: Build and tune background workers and scheduled jobs (ingestion, sync, aggregation)—focusing on failure modes, retries, and deep observability.



Polyglot Contributions: Support Python-based services for streaming, automation, or ML-adjacent pipelines (inference/training) alongside the core stack.



Systems Ops: Enhance our infrastructure practices, including environment discipline, health checks, and container-based deployment patterns.



What we’re looking for

Server-side TypeScript: Deep experience with Node.js; you should be comfortable owning API contracts from end to end.



Modern Frontend: Production-grade React and Next.js (App Router experience is a major plus).



Data Integrity: Solid SQL and PostgreSQL skills with a pragmatic approach to performance and correctness in high-stakes environments.



Asynchronous Logic: Experience running long-lived processes and worker-based systems, not just simple request/response APIs.



Tooling Versatility: Ability to leverage Python for specialized services or data tooling when the use case fits.



Operational Maturity: Clear communication, sound judgment on scope, and the ability to debug across a distributed architecture.



Nice to have

Security & Identity: Experience with OAuth, session security, and API protection tradeoffs.



Infrastructure: Experience with Docker or systemd-style multi-process layouts.



Applied ML: Exposure to ML workflows (training scripts, checkpoints, inference) within a production product.



Streaming Data: Background in high-volume data paths or real-time event streaming.
